items.text:
Casting call for the Indie Short HOTLINE 

TITLE: HOTLINE 

GENRE: Dark Comedy, Absurd 

LOGLINE: When a chaotic former phone sex operator and her too self-controlled coworker hide from an active shooter at their New Year’s Eve office party in a suicide hotline center, they must find a way to stay alive while helping callers do the same. 

ROLES: Need two actresses for both drama and comedy in a B&W short like ROMY & MICHELLE meets WAITING FOR GODOT in a tone similar to KINDS OF KINDNESS or VIRGIN SUICIDES.

SERENA: (Female, 40s, heart of a CEO but stuck in admin, Ali Wong type) Serena’s decisive, competent and moral but maybe a little repressed. Rapid fire dialogue with a light touch, screwball physical comedy, flashes of panic amid bold leadership. 

ROXANE: (Female, 30s, former phone sex operator, Merritt Wever, Jennifer Coolidge type) Roxane might seem naive and dress like a showgirl but she's also wise, sincere empathetic and earthy. Believably gullible, clueless, light touch, comedic timing.

PRODUCTION COMPANY: Very Normal Productions, LLC. Female director Chelsey Schmidt. Cinefemme is a fiscal sponsor. 

PRODUCTION TYPE: Indie, Student Film

TONE: Dark, absurdist, quirky, offbeat, playful, ironic, screwball, claustrophobic,

 

COMPENSATION: $400 stipend for two shooting days, one zoom table read and two half-day rehearsals tbd. Meals and snacks. Transportation set upon request.

RUN TIME: 15 minutes 

UNION: Non-union

SUBMISSIONS: Please send to verynormalprod@gmail.com by March 8, 2026. [Extended from March 1] We can't respond to all applicants, but will be contacting those selected with next steps. 

• Name and contact info

• Headshot or recent photo

• Resume 

• Reel or self tape dark comedy scene/monologue

• Subject line: HOTLINE CASTING - [your name and role]

• Availability weekends in May and June if unavailable May 16, 17

SHOOTING SCHEDULE: Full weekend in May (16, 17)

FILMING LOCATION: Denver/Boulder area, all locations indoors

TW: suicide and active shooter, sexual situations (dialogue only)

Thank you!

items.text:
**ATTENTION ACTORS/READERS!!**

Emily Stephens and Mary Beth Eversole are doing a virtual table read for Emily's feature film script "Marshlights" on Sunday, March 15th from 2-5pm and are in need of actors to read the roles. Emily is seeking feedback for the script so there will be time at the end of the table read for feedback to be given by the actors. Table read is not a guarantee of casting if the film gets made in the future. 

If you are interested in participating, please see the summary and character descriptions and submission instructions below. Please only submit for roles you feel you could portray accurately. 

Roles will be cast on a first come, first serve basis. 

**The narration role and the role of Mrs. Ashford have already been cast.**

Marshlights Table Read

WHERE: Online via zoom. Link will be sent to those cast a few days before the read. 

WHEN: Sunday, March 15th @ 2-5pm

WHO: Written by Emily Stephens, Casting by Emily Stephens and Mary Beth Eversole

PROJECT NAME: Marshlights (91 pages)

SUMMARY: The revelation of a young trans woman in a small post-reconstruction town in South Carolina causes confusion and ultimately a showdown with local white supremacist theology leading to a violent reckoning.

CHARACTERS:

 

**Luke/Lucy** (white/early 20s, trans actors are encouraged to submit):  a trans woman who is the child of an aristocratic line, her father a Colonel from the civil war. She's curious, and (post-transition) lively even flirtatious.

**Mark** (black/mid 20s): a constant servant for Lucy and her family. He is deeply loyal and kind. He accepts Lucy's transition and does his best to protect her.

**Esau **(white/early 20s): Lucy's best friend and son of the local pastor. Esau wrestles endlessly with Luke/Lucy who he loves and the expectations and fragility of his own masculinity.

**Pastor Green** (white/late 40s): a deeply patriarchal true believer of a white supremacist theology that grants the town his version of order.

**Colonel Ashford** (white/late 50s): former civil war Colonel and very rigid man with a distinct conception of masculinity defined through labor and sweat.

**Mahala** (black/late 50s): former slave and a major part of the black community. Honest and powerful keeper of community memory and folklore.

**Amos**(black/30s): a seminary trainee black preacher who acts as the less folkloric spiritual leader. Hard working to support his community and it's elders.

**Mrs. Prioleau**(black/40s): keeper of community after Mahala's death. Focused on keeping her community safe.

**Saint Lucia** (mythic): the literal embodiment of the saint appears to help Lucy be revealed. She is disconnected from time.

There are number of smaller or unnamed characters for small scenes, the readers of Saint Lucia and Mrs. Prioleau will cover those roles. 

SUBMIT TO: marybetheversole@gmail.com with YOUR NAME, YOUR EMAIL, THE ROLE YOU ARE SUBMITTING FOR, and if you can commit to the entire timeframe for the table read. 

**Please do not submit if you cannot commit to the entire timeframe for the table read. **

**Please only submit to roles you feel you could portray accurately.**

sharedPost.text:
Great to see The Miner’s Son climbing the JustWatch charts this week!
A film made with heart about the Kent mining communities of 1984.
If you haven’t seen it yet, you can now stream it on multiple platforms.
Thank you to everyone supporting independent film. ❤️

items.text:
🎭 Neue Chance 

Gerne weiterleiten 🙏

Theaterpädagogik BuT®️ mit interkultureller Kompetenz 

Du liebst Theater, Menschen und kulturelle Vielfalt?

Dann ist das deine Chance:
Am 07.04.2026 startet unsere anerkannte Weiterbildung Theaterpädagogik BuT®️ mit interkultureller Kompetenz 🌍✨

📚 Das erwartet dich:
• 13 Monate Vollzeit
• 1950 Unterrichtseinheiten inkl. 300 UE Praktikum
• Unterricht: Mo–Fr, 09:00–16:00 Uhr
• Praxisnahes Arbeiten mit Szenen, Projekten & Performances
• Interkulturelle Kompetenz als fester Bestandteil der Ausbildung
• BuT®️-anerkannt

🎓 Wichtig zu wissen:
Mit dem BuT®️-Abschluss ist auch eine Anerkennung als sozialpädagogische Fachkraft möglich
(nach § 11 Abs. 3 Nr. 1 VOKitaFöG und § 16 Abs. 3 Nr. 1 SchüFöVO).

Dieser Quereinstieg ist mit bestimmten Auflagen verbunden und kann in die Anerkennung als sozialpädagogische Fachkraft münden.

100% Förderbar mit BIldungsgutschein

Selbstzahler:innen sind herzlich Wilkommen. Auch für Selbstzahlende ist eine Förderung durch KOMPASS möglich. 

📩 Mehr Infos & Anmeldung:
info@adkb-berlin.de
🌐 www.adkb-berlin.de
📞 030 – 405 35040

Bewirb Dich Jetzt! 

Mach mit – und bring Theaterpädagogik & Vielfalt in Bewegung! 🎭💫
#Theaterpädagogik #Berlin #BuT #Weiterbildung #InterkulturelleKompetenz #adkb #Theaterliebe #Quereinstieg #Sozialpädagogik

items.summary:
🎭 Neue Chance 

Gerne weiterleiten 🙏

Theaterpädagogik BuT®️ mit interkultureller Kompetenz 

Du liebst Theater, Menschen und kulturelle Vielfalt?

Dann ist das deine Chance:
Am 07.04.2026 startet unsere anerkannte Weiterbildung Theaterpädagogik BuT®️ mit interkultureller Kompetenz 🌍✨

📚 Das erwartet dich:
• 13 Monate Vollzeit
• 1950 Unterrichtseinheiten inkl. 300 UE Praktikum
• Unterricht: Mo–Fr, 09:00–16:00 Uhr
• Praxisnahes Arbeiten mit Szenen, Projekten & Performances
• Interkulturelle Kompetenz als fester Bestandteil der Ausbildung
• BuT®️-anerkannt

🎓 Wichtig zu wissen:
Mit dem BuT®️-Abschluss ist auch eine Anerkennung als sozialpädagogische Fachkraft möglich
(nach § 11 Abs. 3 Nr. 1 VOKitaFöG und § 16 Abs. 3 Nr. 1 SchüFöVO).

Dieser Quereinstieg ist mit bestimmten Auflagen verbunden und kann in die Anerkennung als sozialpädagogische Fachkraft münden.

100% Förderbar mit BIldungsgutschein

Selbstzahler:innen sind herzlich Wilkommen. Auch für Selbstzahlende ist eine Förderung durch KOMPASS möglich. 

📩 Mehr Infos & Anmeldung:
info@adkb-berlin.de
🌐 www.adkb-berlin.de
📞 030 – 405 35040

Bewirb Dich Jetzt! 

Mach mit – und bring Theaterpädagogik & Vielfalt in Bewegung! 🎭💫
#Theaterpädagogik #Berlin #BuT #Weiterbildung #InterkulturelleKompetenz #adkb #Theaterliebe #Quereinstieg #Sozialpädagogik

message.text:
🎥 In diesem Reel spricht Netzwerkgründer Michael Weilguny über das Künstler*innen Business Frühstück. 

 

👉 Sei dabei beim nächsten KBF! ✨☕️ 

📍 166. Künstler*innen Business Frühstück 
🗓️ Dienstag, 17.03.2026 – 7:15 Uhr 
🏨 Hotel Zeitgeist Vienna, Sonnwendgasse 15, 1100 Wien 

🎤 Vortrag: Dr. Paul Hertel 
🎙️ Moderation: Michael Weilguny 

Regionales und internationales Kunstschaffen – wie gelingt nachhaltiger Erfolg im Musikbusiness? 

Der Komponist, Produzent, Autor und Vizepräsident der AKM Dr. Paul Hertel spricht über das Leben als Künstler zwischen regionaler Verankerung und internationaler Präsenz. Wo liegen Chancen, wo Risiken? Und wie kann man sich trotz KI, Marktveränderungen und steigender Konkurrenz langfristig einen eigenständigen Platz erarbeiten und sichern? 

Ein Frühstück für alle, die künstlerisch denken und unternehmerisch handeln wollen. 

© privat 

 

📲 Mehr Infos & Anmeldung: www.KünstlerBusinessFrühstück.at 
und https://fb.me/e/8GQHxpy5q 

 

#künstlerinnenbusinessfrühstück #kbf #zeitgeistvienna  #musik #akm #composer

short_form_video_context.track_title: Ella Fitzgerald · Let's Fall In Love

message.text:
Oh wie schön war dieser Musik/Kunstabend mit CLARIVOCE und der Atelier Galerie Roland Puschitz im Amtshaus Wieden. 

Voller Saal, glückliche Gäste, perfekt organisierte Darsteller und Musiker mit spannend- selbstbewusster Kunst von Judith Reßler. 

Vielen Dank an allen Gästen, wir freuen uns sehr auf ein Wiedersehen in wenigen Tagen. 

Versäume nie wieder Kunst und Kulturevents von CLARIVOCE und der 
Atelier Galerie Roland Puschitz 
www.puschitz.at 
https://www.puschitz.at/verkauf/ 

Bei Fragen, Anregungen oder Terminvereinbarungen unter 
roland@puschitz.at 
oder 
+436765219895

We’re excited to finally share the very first glimpse of the upcoming film. This teaser offers a taste of the world, atmosphere, and mythic story we’re bringing to life.

Watch the teaser now:
[https://youtu.be/_amx_NTCs5Y](https://youtu.be/_amx_NTCs5Y)

The legend is returning.

#AchillesReturns #FilmTeaser #Mythology #EpicFilm

sharedPost.text:
Hey Leute für unser aktuelles Low Budget Fantasy/Horror Filmprojekt suchen wir noch Darsteller männlich und weiblich für die Endschlacht, Rollen: Ritter und Räuber. Voraussichtlicher Sart der Endschlachtszenen, April 2026, gedreht wird im Bayerischen Wald. Bewerbungen mit 2-3 aktuellen Bildern von euch, sowie eure Körpergröße, Kleidergröße, Schuhgröße, gerne auch ein kurzes Vorstellungsvideo an harlekin-filme@web.de oder direkt per Messenger an Harlekin Filme  

Liebe Grüße, euer Harlekin Filme Team

items.text:
Werde auch DU Teil von Backstage Event Management – Gemeinsam wachsen. Gemeinsam erfolgreich sein.

Du bist Künstlerin oder Künstler mit Vision, Talent und dem Wunsch nach mehr?
Dann ist jetzt der richtige Moment, den nächsten Schritt zu gehen.

Backstage Event Management steht für professionelle Betreuung, starke Netzwerke und echte Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten. Ich begleite dich nicht nur – ich baue mit dir deine Marke auf, strategisch, nachhaltig und individuell.

🎤 Künstlervermittlung & Booking
📈 Karriereplanung & strategischer Aufbau
📣 Marketing & Social Media Support
🤝 Zugang zu exklusiven Events & starken Partnern

Ich glaube an Zusammenarbeit auf Augenhöhe. An Kreativität mit Struktur. Und an Erfolg, der gemeinsam entsteht.

Egal ob Newcomer oder etablierter Künstlerin – wenn du bereit bist, dein Potenzial voll auszuschöpfen, dann freue ich mich darauf, dich kennenzulernen.

Backstage Event Management – Deine Bühne. Dein Moment. Unser gemeinsamer Weg.

Jetzt bewerben und Teil meines Netzwerks werden.

#kuenstlervermittlung #backstageeventkerzenheim

**18.03.26 Środa**
Panowie 20 - 50 lat ( jako żołnierz )
**STAWKA 200 zł ** ( 130zł dzień zdjęciowy + 70zł charakteryzacja )

**19.03.26 Czwartek**
Panowie 20 - 50 lat ( jako żołnierz )
**STAWKA 200 zł ** ( 130zł dzień zdjęciowy + 70zł charakteryzacja )

Panowie 25 -50 l ( **EPIZOD NIEMY **jako żołnierz Radziecki)
Wymagana wizytówka w postaci linka do you tube )
**STAWKA 300 zł ** ( 230zł dzień zdjęciowy + 70zł charakteryzacja )

**CHARAKTERYZACJA 14,03.26  Sobota **

Wytyczne charakteryzacji:
- panowie na mundurowych mogą mieć włosy krótsze, odsłonięte uszy i kark, ale niewygoleni maszynką. Ogoleni na gładko.

Zgłoszenia poproszę na adres: **jarek.drzycimski@podtytulem.pl**
W tytule: **K 18 lub K19** ( wybrany dzień )

W treści: imię i nazwisko, wiek, nr telefonu, miejscowość + wymiary: wzrost, klatka, pas, biodra, rozmiar ubrania i buta
W załączniku: ZDJĘCIE TWARZY I SYLWETKI: tylko z dnia zgłoszenia + panowie zdjęcie twarzy z profilu
ZDJĘCIE TWARZY - portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe.
ZDJĘCIE SYLWETKI – aktualne, cała sylwetka
**SERDECZNIE ZAPRASZAMY**

WARSZAWA 17.03.2026r. 

Z poszukiwaniami statystów do filmu o znanym sportowcu, przenosimy się do Warszawy i tym razem szukamy Panów w wieku 20-60, którzy chcieliby wcielić się w rolę takie jak reporterzy, trenerzy czy sportowcy. 

STAWKA 120 zł 

Zgłoszenia proszę wysyłać na maila: agata@podtytulem.pl
W tytule maila: A17
Zgłoszenia muszą zawierać: imię i nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu oraz aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki, najlepiej z dnia zgłoszenia. 
ZDJĘCIE TWARZY: Portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe. 

Widzimy się na planie!

items.text:
**🎬Casting Call! For a STUDENT FILM ‘Playback’🎬 URGENT!**

📍**LOCATION:** Hitchin

📆 **DATES:** Tuesday 17th March – Thursday 19th March

💵 **EXPENSES:** Travel and food expenses will be covered

 

**THERAPIST (Monica/Mark): **An **intelligent and compassionate** therapist who remains **calm** under the pressure of her recent client, Zak, who is certain that he sees things in his sleep. They stay **rational and grounded** around Zak - until unsettling evidence suggests something far more disturbing is happening, which results in a** subtle shift **from** confidence to quiet dread.**

**PLAYING AGE: 20+**

**GENDER: ANY**

 

**MOTHER/FATHER (Helen/Harry): **A **caring and devoted parent** of Zak who only wants the best for him, through finding it tough to stay strong and rational. Constantly trying to **talk it through** with Zak and questioning his apparent instability while conveying a **maternal instinct** yet a quiet, **emotional strain** as they see Zak spiralling out of control.  

**PLAYING AGE: 30+**

**GENDER: ANY**

 

**📖SYNOPSIS:** After coming face to face with a sinister figure in the middle of the night, Zak; a young man suffering with mental health issues (or so he’s been told), decides to film himself whilst he sleeps to prove that the figure is more than just an illusion. These odd behaviours are worrying to his **mother/father,** who want the best for him. After showing the footage to his **therapist** (who claims to see nothing), he decides that it is time to take things into his own hands. Instead of going to sleep, he waits for the figure to strike and deals a killing blow. Having caught it all on camera, he shows the proof to his **therapist,** who soon realises that the figure was Zak’s **mother/father** and that perhaps their next session should be separated by a prison cell...

 

Please email [playbacktalent@gmail.com](mailto:playbacktalent@gmail.com) if you are interested, or want further information, with a headshot and showreel if applicable! 😊

items.text:
CALLING EASTERN EUROPEAN ARTISTS

We are putting together a curated performance evening featuring Eastern European artists based in the UK.

We’re looking for performers who would like to share a short piece inspired by real stories and themes of identity, culture, family, and living between places.

Monologue • Poetry • Music • Movement

If this resonates with you and you’d like to take part, send us a message.

Must be available on the 12th of April - performance date, plus rehearsals prior to that 

Venue: OSO Arts Centre 

Please, contact me for more details: maria.stana10@gmail.com 

📍 London
🎭 Limited number of performers

items.text:
🔥** AUDITION CALL – PROFESSIONAL HEELS / HIP-HOP TEAM **🔥

**PAID WORK.   Spots are limited. Serious dancers only.**

**We are looking for 3 strong, versatile female dancers to join a professional Heels/Hip-Hop performance team for a short season. This is your opportunity to train and perform.**

✨** We’re Looking For:**

**• Women 18+,  Minimum height 5’6” (without heels)**

**• Strong foundation in Heels and/or Hip-Hop**

**• Performance quality and stage presence**

**• Confidence, musicality, and work ethic**

**• Commitment to rehearsals and bookings. The show routine you will learn to perform will be approximately three minute. **

💃** What You’ll Be Part Of:**

**• Professional performances & showcases**

**• High-quality concept videos**

**• Brand collaborations & paid opportunities**

**• Intensive training & choreography development**

**• A powerful, supportive team culture**

💰** Paid training & 6 performances. **

💐**show dates (performers must be able to do at least three or more of these dates (showtimes will be in the evening approximately 10 pm):**

20 April  Mon. Wimbledon 

25 April  Sat. Putney

29 April  Wed. Hammersmith  

1 May Fri - Fulham

5 May Tues - Fulham 

7  May Thur Earls Court

📍** Audition Details:**

**Date:   14th March 2026**

**Time:   4-6pm**

**Location: Dance Attic Studios, Fulham. **

**Dress Code: Form-fitting dancewear + heels**

**Bring: Heels,  Knee pads & water**

🎥** To Apply - register for free through website. **

**Deadline:   13th March (11:59pm)**

[https://www.incognitodance.com/auditions/](https://www.incognitodance.com/auditions/)

# Join us for The Funny Life Film Festival 2026 - 20th & 21st March in North London!

Celebrating Comedy in our 4th year - we are screening 47 fabulously funny films including 9 UK Premieres; LIVE Stand-Up Comedy; Filmmaker Workshops with top industry professionals; Networking; Awards Ceremony; After-Party and MORE!!!

items.summary:
# Join us for The Funny Life Film Festival 2026 - 20th & 21st March in North London!

Celebrating Comedy in our 4th year - we are screening 47 fabulously funny films including 9 UK Premieres; LIVE Stand-Up Comedy; Filmmaker Workshops with top industry professionals; Networking; Awards Ceremony; After-Party and MORE!!!

Full Programme and Ticket Link:

# www.thefunnylifefilmfestival.com/2026

See you there!!!

items.text:
**CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM “THE SCAM” (Expenses Paid)**

After a series of slick sales calls, a retired man is moments away from transferring his life savings to an investment “advisor” he’s never met. But when a sudden internet outage interrupts the transaction, the pause shatters the illusion — forcing him to confront truth, desperation, and the human cost of manipulation.

Casting For:

**Young Peter (20–35)** – male, well spoken

**Peter’s Son (20–30)** – male, techy/geeky

**(Other roles now cast)**

**Location:** Around Sutton, Surrey
**Auditions:** Closing date for submissions - 11th March 2026
**Shoot:** April 2026
**Paid:** Expenses only (travel + food)
**Genre:** Suspense / dark comedy-drama

Script/ further information: https://suttonfilm.co.uk/script/the-scam/

To apply: https://suttonfilm.co.uk/casting-call/

Any questions? - please PM me.

items.text:
SHORT FILM CASTING CALL!!!
Casting "Waiting Room," a short film. Three siblings come to a hospital because they have been told that their dad is going in for emergency surgery that could lead to him losing his life. Whilst in the waiting room, there is a tension that hangs above all of them, of something unsaid about past abuse.

Roles: 

Willow (27-30)

Outgoing and vibrant, but there’s far more going on beneath the surface. She’s a contradiction: at times she seems unable to read the room, yet she has a deep, almost instinctive understanding of what others are feeling. This raises the question - why can she see everyone else so clearly, but not herself?

Olivia (29-32)

The matriarch of the family. She isn’t Willow and Lucas’s mother, but they both look up to her as if she were. She carries quiet authority, and with it, the weight of responsibility - she has always been the one forced to make the hard decisions. She may have sensed that Willow and Lucas were carrying something, but she never knew the full truth until now.

Shoots 27th-29th March in Salford/Manchester, TBA.

Please send your headshot, resume/spotlight with any examples of work to Kelsielea123@hotmail.com

PLEASE NOTE: These are unpaid roles! Showreel footage, travel and food expenses will be paid.

sharedPost.text:
CALLING ALL ACTORS

The Panto Theatre is casting three roles (Buttons, Cinderella, and Dame) to be featured in an upcoming documentary Directed by @elizabeth_dealande with Salt Lake Community College about our theatre. Filming will take place in March and April, with specific dates and times provided in advance.

To apply, please email jords@thepantotheatre.com with the following:

• Your resume
• Your availability for all of March and April
• A headshot (included on your resume or attached as a separate file)

No singing or acting submission is required at this stage.

Please ensure all attached or linked documents have sharing permissions enabled so they can be accessed.

Online submissions are due March 10, 2026.

items.text:
Sam – Male Lead
Sam is a white/light-skinned man in his mid-20s to early-30s, Quietly intense. The kind of man who doesn’t speak unless he has something worth saying.

He is sweet, loving, kind, protective his main motivation is being with his family and protecting them. ACTOR MUST BE BASED IN OHIO

Physically, Sam should appear athletic or naturally solid. not bodybuilder ripped, but strong in a believable way. Think former high school athlete who still works with his hands or stays active. A slight dad-bod edge is completely fine. He should feel capable.

Appearance-wise:

 • Scruffy or slightly rugged is ideal.

 • Facial hair preferred (short beard/stubble).

 • Manly, natural look — not polished or overly groomed

items.text:
**CASTING CALL**

We are currently casting for an independent short film shooting in Los Angeles in June. Production will take place over 3 days (TBD on exact dates). 

**Logline:**

Pushed to the brink by his demanding father, a thirteen-year-old spelling prodigy must decide whether to win a high-stakes championship or intentionally sabotage a spelling bee.

**Cast Descriptions:**

VINNY SINGH (Age Range: 11-15)

Lead. South Asian.

Rate: $500 Flat

A lanky, awkward spelling prodigy who carries the weight of his father’s immense expectations in his nervous, picking fingers. He is anxious and introverted, but deeply observant.  

VIKRAM SINGH (Age Range 6-9)

Supporting. South Asian.

Rate: $250 Flat

The adorable, oblivious younger brother who is more interested in his Game Boy than the high-stakes drama unfolding around him. He is playful, curious, and sweet.  

AARON (Age Range 11-15)

Supporting. Open Ethnicity. 

Rate: $250 Flat

Calm and self-assured, Aaron is the steady, razor-sharp finalist who stands between Vinny and the championship.

BOBBY SINGH (Age Range: Late 30s-50s)

Supporting. South Asian.

Rate: $500 Flat

A weathered, intense patriarch who operates less like a father and more like a ruthless boxing coach. He loves his children, but he loves winning more.  

**Submission Requirements:**
* Headshot
* Resume
* Reel or recent self-tape
* Slate (name, age, height, location)
* Parent/guardian contact (if under 18)
* Availability for June shoot dates in Los Angeles
* 

*Sides will be sent to selected actors after initial submission review.*

Please send all material to: cyuscasting@gmail.com

**Submission Requirements:**
* Headshot
* Resume
* Reel or recent self-tape
* Slate (name, age, height, location)
* Parent/guardian contact (if under 18)
* Availability for June shoot dates in Los Angeles
* 

*Sides will be sent to selected actors after initial submission review.*

Please send all material to: cyuscasting@gmail.com

items.text:
🎬 GREAT SCREEN ACTING ISN’T JUST ABOUT SHOWING EMOTION —

IT’S ABOUT GENERATING THE RIGHT ONE, TRUTHFULLY.

In this Masterclass, I take you inside and explore the directors process for working with actors for film and television.

Scripts are not instructions — they are blueprints, layered with meaning, intention and emotional truth that often sits well beneath the surface, and you must be able to read those hidden levels to respond to what the story truly requires.

As a director, I understand how to shape emotional flow across a scene and guide an actor to exactly what the story needs. 

As a screenwriter, I know how to infer the hidden emotional layers beneath the dialogue.

As an actor, you must use your own experience and perception to inhabit the character’s world fully then play your own internal emotional landscape — with timing, control and sensitivity — in tune with the story.

Then you your work becomes truthful, compelling and eminently castable.

This class will explore all of the above subjects and is open to anyone who is interested. 

📅 **Date & Time**
Wednesday 25th March 2026
7.30pm – 9.00pm UK Time 

🧾 **How to Book**
For all details including how to reserve your place-go to:
https://screen-acting.com/masterclass

And if you have any questions, just pop them in the comments.

items.text:
**Who’s joining us in the MAGNIFICENT VILLA for CANNES 2026!?** 🎬🥂

We now only have **a few spots left**!

For those of you who joined me last year… you already know the coup.

This year we’ll be in our **super swanky Cannes villa for 8 nights**, from **12th–20th May**, covering almost the entire festival.

The cost is **£1,250 per person** or **£2,500 per twin room**.
(It may sound like a lot, but the villa itself costs **£20K+ for the 8 days**, and of course this is **the biggest and most prestigious film festival in the world**!)

Your stay includes:

• **Breakfast each morning at the villa**
• **Exclusive VIP tickets** to the **MAGNIFICENT FILMS Party**
• **VIP invitations to additional industry soirées** we’ll be hosting at the villa (TBC)

As villa residents, you’ll also have the option to host **small daytime industry networking soirées** during the festival.

If you’d like to host a **larger evening event (50+ guests)**, let us know and we’ll do our best to accommodate you.

If you’re interested in joining us, **DM me here** or contact **Harriet**, who will be running villa admin this year:

[harriet@magnificentfilms.co.uk](mailto:harriet@magnificentfilms.co.uk)

Would love to see some familiar faces — and some new ones — in **Cannes!**

**Final spaces now being allocated.**

Xx ✨

items.text:
🃏 Heath Ledger didn't just play a comic book villain—he delivered a masterclass in character motivation. But how did he make such an unrealistic character feel so grounded?
In our latest clip, we explore the genius behind Ledger’s Joker. When the Batman franchise felt "exhausted," the filmmakers pivoted to a raw, naturalistic style. Instead of relying on tired tropes, Ledger focused entirely on what his character desperately wanted.

🎬 The lesson for actors: Whether you're on stage or screen, if you don't know your character's deepest desires, your audience won't care. Find the desire, find the truth.

Watch our quick breakdown below! 👇

What do YOU think made Ledger's performance so unforgettable? Let us know in the comments where you will also find a link to the full lesson!
items.title: Five Actors One Part. What Acting Tips Can We Learn From The Joker?

CASTING CALL : DRIP ACTION THEATRE COMPANY, ARUNDEL, WEST SUSSEX

Drip Action Theatre Company is casting for:

‘The Unfriend’ by Steven Moffat

Performance Dates: Wednesday 17th to Saturday 20th June 2026 at South Stoke Barn, BN18 9PF (just outside of Arundel)

We are looking to cast two roles in this comedy play which originally opened in the Minerva Theatre at Chichester Festival Theatre in 2022 and transferred to the West End.

The Roles are:

‘Debbie’ wife of ‘Peter’ (two of the three lead roles)
Age range: mid-30s – late 40s ( Mother of two teenagers)

‘Alex’ , son of 'Peter' and 'Debbie' – age range: 18-plus who can play a teenage boy.

This is an unpaid project but it is a chance of working with a dynamic and innovative theatre company!

If you are (or know somebody) who might be interested/available, please make contact directly, with Deni Jones, Director : 07760948550 or djonesasana@gmail.com

items.text:
**🎬Casting Call! For a STUDENT FILM ‘Playback’🎬 URGENT!**

📍**LOCATION:** Hitchin

📆 **DATES:** Tuesday 17th March – Thursday 19th March

💵 **EXPENSES:** Travel and food expenses will be covered

 

**THERAPIST (Monica/Mark): **An **intelligent and compassionate** therapist who remains **calm** under the pressure of her recent client, Zak, who is certain that he sees things in his sleep. They stay **rational and grounded** around Zak - until unsettling evidence suggests something far more disturbing is happening, which results in a** subtle shift **from** confidence to quiet dread.**

**PLAYING AGE: 20+**

**GENDER: ANY**

 

**MOTHER/FATHER (Helen/Harry): **A **caring and devoted parent** of Zak who only wants the best for him, through finding it tough to stay strong and rational. Constantly trying to **talk it through** with Zak and questioning his apparent instability while conveying a **maternal instinct** yet a quiet, **emotional strain** as they see Zak spiralling out of control.  

**PLAYING AGE: 30+**

**GENDER: ANY**

 

**📖SYNOPSIS:** After coming face to face with a sinister figure in the middle of the night, Zak; a young man suffering with mental health issues (or so he’s been told), decides to film himself whilst he sleeps to prove that the figure is more than just an illusion. These odd behaviours are worrying to his **mother/father,** who want the best for him. After showing the footage to his **therapist** (who claims to see nothing), he decides that it is time to take things into his own hands. Instead of going to sleep, he waits for the figure to strike and deals a killing blow. Having caught it all on camera, he shows the proof to his **therapist,** who soon realises that the figure was Zak’s **mother/father** and that perhaps their next session should be separated by a prison cell...

 

Please email [playbacktalent@gmail.com](mailto:playbacktalent@gmail.com) if you are interested, or want further information, with a headshot and showreel if applicable! 😊
items.summary:
**🎬Casting Call! For a STUDENT FILM ‘Playback’🎬 URGENT!**

📍**LOCATION:** Hitchin

📆 **DATES:** Tuesday 17th March – Thursday 19th March

💵 **EXPENSES:** Travel and food expenses will be covered

 

**THERAPIST (Monica/Mark): **An **intelligent and compassionate** therapist who remains **calm** under the pressure of her recent client, Zak, who is certain that he sees things in his sleep. They stay **rational and grounded** around Zak - until unsettling evidence suggests something far more disturbing is happening, which results in a** subtle shift **from** confidence to quiet dread.**

**PLAYING AGE: 20+**

**GENDER: ANY**

 

**MOTHER/FATHER (Helen/Harry): **A **caring and devoted parent** of Zak who only wants the best for him, through finding it tough to stay strong and rational. Constantly trying to **talk it through** with Zak and questioning his apparent instability while conveying a **maternal instinct** yet a quiet, **emotional strain** as they see Zak spiralling out of control.  

**PLAYING AGE: 30+**

**GENDER: ANY**

 

**📖SYNOPSIS:** After coming face to face with a sinister figure in the middle of the night, Zak; a young man suffering with mental health issues (or so he’s been told), decides to film himself whilst he sleeps to prove that the figure is more than just an illusion. These odd behaviours are worrying to his **mother/father,** who want the best for him. After showing the footage to his **therapist** (who claims to see nothing), he decides that it is time to take things into his own hands. Instead of going to sleep, he waits for the figure to strike and deals a killing blow. Having caught it all on camera, he shows the proof to his **therapist,** who soon realises that the figure was Zak’s **mother/father** and that perhaps their next session should be separated by a prison cell...

 

Please email [playbacktalent@gmail.com](mailto:playbacktalent@gmail.com) if you are interested, or want further information, with a headshot and showreel if applicable! 😊

items.text:
CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM

“Stars Above Us”

Filming Dates: June 5–7, 2026
Location: Bowling Green, Kentucky
Audition Type: Self-tapes only
Unpaid - student film - Non-union.

Film Plot

Stars Above Us is a powerful coming-of-age drama about friendship, mental health, and the signs people often miss.

The story follows Eli, a quiet high school student, and his best friend Lina Carmichael — a bold, rebellious girl who seems fearless on the outside. While Lina jokes, skips class, and stares at the stars dreaming of something bigger, she secretly struggles with feelings of isolation and depression.

As Eli and their friend Becca begin to notice Lina pulling away, tensions rise at school with bullying and pressure from their peers. What seems like ordinary teenage drama slowly reveals deeper pain beneath the surface. When Lina disappears from school, Eli is forced to confront the truth he never saw coming.

The film explores grief, friendship, and the importance of recognizing when someone you care about is hurting.

Character Breakdown

Lina Carmichael

Gender: Female
Age Range: 16–20 (to play 16)
Lead Role

Lina Carmichael is bold, funny, and rebellious. She walks through the halls like she owns the place — wearing ripped clothes, spiked heels, and a fearless grin. She’s the kind of person who asks ridiculous “would you rather” questions and drags her friends into skipping class just for the adventure.

But beneath the confidence, Lina feels deeply out of place in the world. She carries emotional wounds from her past and struggles with depression she doesn’t fully understand or know how to explain. At times she’s vulnerable, distant, and overwhelmed by feelings she tries to hide behind humor and attitude.

Key Traits
 • Charismatic and energetic
 • Sharp wit and sarcastic humor
 • Emotionally complex and vulnerable
 • Fiercely independent
 • Capable of explosive anger and quiet heartbreak

This role requires an actress who can balance strong personality with subtle emotional depth. Lina is both the brightest presence in the room and the quietest cry for help.

Audition Information

Audition Type: Self-Tape Submission Only

To Submit:
Email Cassidy Shortridge, Casting Coordinator at
cassidy.shortridge@yahoo.com

Include:
 • Subject Line: Your Name – Role Submission
 • Name
 • Age
 • Headshot
 • Resume (if available)
 • Self-tape audition for Lina Carmichael

items.text:
Motzmobil auf Pro7, Christian Weiße trifft Pfarrer Nils Petrat bei Alpha Entertainment. Du bekommst echte Antworten, warum Kirche Alltag aufgreift, aktuelle Themen deutet und offene Fragen nicht fürchten muss. 

In diesem kurzen Motzmobil Statement auf Pro7 triffst Du zusammen mit mir, Christian Weiße, auf Pfarrer Nils Petrat, im Umfeld von Alpha Entertainment. Du bekommst direkt erklärt, warum das Format so gebaut ist, Alltag aufzunehmen und daraus eine klare Message zu machen, mit ethischer Botschaft und kirchlicher Botschaft, ohne moralischen Zeigefinger. 

Du hörst, wie Pfarrer Nils den Kern beschreibt, Kirche ist nicht nur Ritual, sondern Gespräch über das, was Dich im Alltag wirklich trifft. Genau deshalb werden aktuelle Themen aufgegriffen und gedeutet, damit aus Erlebnissen Sinn werden kann. 

Wir gehen auch auf den Reibungspunkt ein, den viele denken, tritt man mit speziellen Fragen in der Kirche jemandem auf die Füße, oder ist Kirche heute so weit, dass genau diese Offenheit gebraucht wird. Dieses Video ist damit ein schneller Reality Check, wie modern Kirche sein kann, wenn sie sich nicht versteckt. 

Wenn Du mehr willst, schau in die Motzmobil Videogalerie und in weitere Clips aus dem Umfeld, damit Du mehr Key Moments zu Glauben, Kirche und Alltag bekommst. 

Abo, Glocke, Like und dann schreib Deine Frage unten rein, damit wir die nächsten Motzmobil Themen daran ausrichten. 

Welche Frage zu Glauben und Kirche würdest Du heute offen stellen, wenn niemand Dich dafür bewertet?

Links und Ressourcen https://katholisch.de/ 

Motzmobil Videogalerie https://katholisch.de/videoserie/68-prosieben-motzmobil 

Hier bekommst Du Interviews, Statements und Mini Formate zu Alltag, Medien und Sinnfragen. 

Welche konkrete Alltagsszene hat Dich zuletzt zweifeln lassen, und welche Antwort würdest Du Dir von Kirche wünschen? 

Abonniere, aktiviere die Glocke und gib dem Video ein Like 

Kommentiere Deine Frage und klick danach in die Motzmobil Playlist 

Teile das Video und markiere eine Person, die Kirche moderner denkt! 

Christian Weiße aka Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion 

#motzmobil #pro7 #kirchemodern #glaube

items.summary:
Motzmobil auf Pro7, Christian Weiße trifft Pfarrer Nils Petrat bei Alpha Entertainment. Du bekommst echte Antworten, warum Kirche Alltag aufgreift, aktuelle Themen deutet und offene Fragen nicht fürchten muss. 

In diesem kurzen Motzmobil Statement auf Pro7 triffst Du zusammen mit mir, Christian Weiße, auf Pfarrer Nils Petrat, im Umfeld von Alpha Entertainment. Du bekommst direkt erklärt, warum das Format so gebaut ist, Alltag aufzunehmen und daraus eine klare Message zu machen, mit ethischer Botschaft und kirchlicher Botschaft, ohne moralischen Zeigefinger. 

Du hörst, wie Pfarrer Nils den Kern beschreibt, Kirche ist nicht nur Ritual, sondern Gespräch über das, was Dich im Alltag wirklich trifft. Genau deshalb werden aktuelle Themen aufgegriffen und gedeutet, damit aus Erlebnissen Sinn werden kann. 

Wir gehen auch auf den Reibungspunkt ein, den viele denken, tritt man mit speziellen Fragen in der Kirche jemandem auf die Füße, oder ist Kirche heute so weit, dass genau diese Offenheit gebraucht wird. Dieses Video ist damit ein schneller Reality Check, wie modern Kirche sein kann, wenn sie sich nicht versteckt. 

Wenn Du mehr willst, schau in die Motzmobil Videogalerie und in weitere Clips aus dem Umfeld, damit Du mehr Key Moments zu Glauben, Kirche und Alltag bekommst. 

Abo, Glocke, Like und dann schreib Deine Frage unten rein, damit wir die nächsten Motzmobil Themen daran ausrichten. 

Welche Frage zu Glauben und Kirche würdest Du heute offen stellen, wenn niemand Dich dafür bewertet?

Links und Ressourcen https://katholisch.de/ 

Motzmobil Videogalerie https://katholisch.de/videoserie/68-prosieben-motzmobil 

Hier bekommst Du Interviews, Statements und Mini Formate zu Alltag, Medien und Sinnfragen. 

Welche konkrete Alltagsszene hat Dich zuletzt zweifeln lassen, und welche Antwort würdest Du Dir von Kirche wünschen? 

Abonniere, aktiviere die Glocke und gib dem Video ein Like 

Kommentiere Deine Frage und klick danach in die Motzmobil Playlist 

Teile das Video und markiere eine Person, die Kirche moderner denkt! 

Christian Weiße aka Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion 

#motzmobil #pro7 #kirchemodern #glaube

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – Hauptdarstellerinnen gesucht
Psychologisches Drama / Liebesdrama  

📍 Drehort: Stuttgart  

🎥 Produktion: TT Films  

📺 Veröffentlichung: YouTube & weitere Plattformen  

Für unseren neuen intensiven Kurzfilm suchen wir zwei Hauptdarstellerinnen:

✨ LINA (25–30)  

Warm. Emotional offen.  

Augen voller Vertrauen – und Verletzlichkeit.  

Sie liebt tief und ehrlich. Ihre Stärke ist ihre Sanftheit.

✨ SOPHIA (25–30)  

Elegant. Mysteriös. Provozierend.  

Augen wie ein Rätsel.  

Selbstbewusst, kontrolliert – mit einer dunklen Tiefe.

🎭 Genre: Psychologisches Drama / Liebesdrama  

Eine Geschichte über Leidenschaft, emotionale Zerrissenheit und psychische Spannung.

ℹ️ Wichtige Infos:  

– Es handelt sich um ein Hobby-/Independent-Projekt  

– Leider keine Gage  

– Der fertige Film kann für euer Portfolio/Showreel genutzt werden  

– Verpflegung am Set ist organisiert  

– Dreh in Stuttgart – Bewerberinnen aus der Nähe bevorzugt  

🎬 Was wir suchen:  

– Ausdrucksstarke Mimik  

– Natürliches, intensives Spiel  

– Zuverlässigkeit & Leidenschaft für Film  

📩 Bewerbung mit:  

– 2–3 aktuelle Fotos  

– Kurze Vorstellung (Name, Alter, Wohnort)  

– Optional: Showreel  

DM oder E-Mail: tt.films@hotmail.com

message.text:
🎥 In diesem Reel spricht Elisabeth Monamy über das Out-Of-The-Box-Denken. 

 

👉 Sei dabei beim nächsten KBF! ✨☕️ 

📍 166. Künstler*innen Business Frühstück 
🗓️ Dienstag, 17.03.2026 – 7:15 Uhr 
🏨 Hotel Zeitgeist Vienna, Sonnwendgasse 15, 1100 Wien 

🎤 Vortrag: Dr. Paul Hertel 
🎙️ Moderation: Michael Weilguny 

Regionales und internationales Kunstschaffen – wie gelingt nachhaltiger Erfolg im Musikbusiness? 

Der Komponist, Produzent, Autor und Vizepräsident der AKM Dr. Paul Hertel spricht über das Leben als Künstler zwischen regionaler Verankerung und internationaler Präsenz. Wo liegen Chancen, wo Risiken? Und wie kann man sich trotz KI, Marktveränderungen und steigender Konkurrenz langfristig einen eigenständigen Platz erarbeiten und sichern? 

Ein Frühstück für alle, die künstlerisch denken und unternehmerisch handeln wollen. 

© privat 

 

📲 Mehr Infos & Anmeldung: www.KünstlerBusinessFrühstück.at 
und https://fb.me/e/8GQHxpy5q 

 

#künstlerinnenbusinessfrühstück #kbf #zeitgeistvienna  #musik #akm #composer

message.text:
Na na na, wo siehst du hin😉 

Wir feiern die Woche starker und selbstbewusster Frauen 💐 
Die Atelier Galerie Roland Puschitz zeigt diese Woche 2 Ausstellungen zum Thema 👍 
Morgen Dienstag 03.03.2026 um 19:00 Uhr die erst im Amtshaus Wieden, kommt vorbei und hört wundervolle Musik in Frauentöne von CLARIVOCE und beäugt dabei die selbstbewussten Bilder von Judith Reßler. 

Die Ausschnitte in diesem Reel versprechen sehr spannende Kunstwerke. 

Amtshaus Festsaal Wieden 
Favoritenstraße 18,  1040 Wien 

www.puschitz.at 
https://www.puschitz.at/verkauf/ 

Gratis Platzreservierungen unter 
roland@puschitz.at 
+436765219895 

#ateliergalerierolandpuschitz #rolandpuschitz
#contemporary #follower #judithressler

items.text:
FILM FABULARNY LATA 70 - WARSZAWA O Polskim bohaterze dla znanej platformy streamingowej Szukamy statystów

**18.03.26 Środa**
Panowie 20 - 50 lat ( jako żołnierz )
**STAWKA 200 zł ** ( 130zł dzień zdjęciowy + 70zł charakteryzacja )

**19.03.26 Czwartek**
Panowie 20 - 50 lat ( jako żołnierz )
**STAWKA 200 zł ** ( 130zł dzień zdjęciowy + 70zł charakteryzacja )

Panowie 25 -50 l ( **EPIZOD NIEMY **jako żołnierz Radziecki)
Wymagana wizytówka w postaci linka do you tube )
**STAWKA 300 zł ** ( 230zł dzień zdjęciowy + 70zł charakteryzacja )

**CHARAKTERYZACJA 14,03.26  Sobota **

Wytyczne charakteryzacji:
- panowie na mundurowych mogą mieć włosy krótsze, odsłonięte uszy i kark, ale niewygoleni maszynką. Ogoleni na gładko.

Zgłoszenia poproszę na adres: **jarek.drzycimski@podtytulem.pl**
W tytule: **K 18 lub K19** ( wybrany dzień )

W treści: imię i nazwisko, wiek, nr telefonu, miejscowość + wymiary: wzrost, klatka, pas, biodra, rozmiar ubrania i buta
W załączniku: ZDJĘCIE TWARZY I SYLWETKI: tylko z dnia zgłoszenia + panowie zdjęcie twarzy z profilu
ZDJĘCIE TWARZY - portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe.
ZDJĘCIE SYLWETKI – aktualne, cała sylwetka
**SERDECZNIE ZAPRASZAMY**

items.text:
**Mini serial  wojenny 1940 – Mężczyzni do roli Gestapo ( casting on-line )**

 

Szukamy skarbu Zakonu Templariuszy z 1307 roku!

 

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów **‘’Grupa1940’’** poszukuje dwóch mężczyzn po rosłem budowie ciała, wzroście 175 – 180 do roli 2 członków Gestapo, którzy będą zatrzymywać w mieszkaniu kilka osób.  Jedna z postaci ma kilka kwestii po niemiecku a druga kilka po Polsku. Mile widziana osoba **z Gliwic lub okolic, Zabrze czy Katowice.** Szukamy kogoś bez farbowanych włosów czy braku zarostu. Zdjęcia próbne planujemy

 

**Od maja 2026 planujemy realizacje zdjęc do tego **projektu. Będziemy realizować mini serial oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Od 01.04.25 założyliśmy swój kanał na portalu youtube z filmami z naszych planów żeby można było zobaczyć jak to u nas wygląda od kuchni. 

 

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g

 

**Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

items.text:
** **

**18 Mini serial wojenny 1940 historyczny z elementami Fantazy**

** **

**Oficer francuski -  mężczyzna**

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów ‘’Grupa1940’’ poszukuje ** mężczyznę** **bez zarostu w obwodzie klatki 95 –105 cm, pas: 85 –95 cm** w **wieku 20 – 50** lat do roli oficera francuskiego .Szukamy kogoś mieszkającego w **Gliwic lub okolic**: Zabrze, Katowice najdalej gdyż odległość do tej roli ma znaczenie. Kostium jest już zrobiony na konkretny wymiar a osoba grająca tego oficera będzie zmiennikiem innego o podobnych parametrach. Same zdjęcia będą realizowane na terenie Gliwic. Szykujemy się do kilku scen bitewnych z francuzami. Kilka postaci ma nieduże kwestie po francusku.

 

**Na wiosnę roku 2026 planujemy realizacje zdjęc do tego **projektu. Będziemy realizować mini serial oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt a się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

items.text:
Jeremy Holzl am Set: Respekt für Deine Beständigkeit 

Jeremy, diese drei Bilder stehen für genau das, was am Set zählt: stille Verlässlichkeit, echte Kollegialität und ein Mensch, auf den man sich einfach freuen kann und all dies mit drei Deiner starken unverwechselbaren Gesichtsausdrücke! 

Als Komparse, u. a. in der RTL Serie "Alles was zählt" und "Unter uns" bist Du nicht nur jemand, der da ist, wenn es drauf ankommt, sondern jemand, der mit Haltung, Respekt und einer angenehm ruhigen Art das Setklima spürbar besser macht. Genau diese Beständigkeit, dieses unaufgeregte Dranbleiben, macht am Ende den Unterschied, weil damit Schritt für Schritt Dinge möglich werden, die vorher nur wie ein Wunsch wirkten. 

Und dann kommt noch etwas dazu, das viele unterschätzen: Du bist auch Fahrer für ein Unternehmen, das Schauspieler zuverlässig ans Set und in Hotels bringt. Das heißt, Du hältst Abläufe am Laufen, bevor die Kamera überhaupt angeht, und genau dafür gebührt Dir genauso Anerkennung wie für alles, was man im Bild sieht. 

Wir zwei, Christian und Sandra, sind jedes Mal wirklich froh, wenn wir am Set mit Dir sind, weil Du genau diese Mischung mitbringst: professionell, menschlich, kollegial. Danke, dass Du so bist, wie Du bist, und dass Du Deine Energie so konstant in dieses Umfeld gibst. 

Wenn Du Jeremy schon am Set erlebt hast, was schätzt Du an seiner Art am meisten, und wen sollte ich als nächstes mit so einer Collage ehren?

Idee, Bilder und Text Christian Weiße und Sandra Wötzel 

#JeremyHolzl #AllesWasZaehlt #UnterUns #RTL #SetLife

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of one or more people, beard and text that says 'Idee & Bild ©hristian Weiße @hristianWeißeKöin Köln ← jeremy_holzl Jeremy JeremyHölzi Hölzl 56 896 Beiträge Follower ලි jeremy_holzl jeremy. 429 Gefolgt'

message.text: Ein Rosenkrieg bezeichnet eine extrem heftige, von Hass und Zerstörungswillen geprägte Scheidungs- oder Trennungsschlacht, bei der Ex-Partner versuchen, sich gegenseitig maximal zu schaden. Der Begriff leitet sich von den englischen Thronfolgekämpfen (1455–1485) zwischen den Häusern York und Lancaster ab, die Wappenrosen, so Google 🌹💥

FILM FABULARNY LATA 70 - O Polskim bohaterze dla znanej platformy streamingowej Szukamy statystów 

**31.03.2026  WTOREK **

Panowie 18 -35 lat ( Jako kandydat na Pilota )

**STAWKA 200 zł** ( za dzień zdjęciowy + charakteryzacja ) 

**CHARAKTERYZACJA 30.03.2026**

Wytyczne charakteryzacji:

- panowie na mundurowych mogą mieć włosy krótsze, odsłonięte uszy i kark, ale niewygoleni maszynką. Ogoleni na gładko. 

Zgłoszenia poproszę na adres:** ****[[jarek.drzycimski@podtytulem.pl](mailto:jarek.drzycimski@podtytulem.pl)](mailto:jarek.drzycimski@podtytulem.pl)**

W tytule: **G31 **

W treści: imię i nazwisko, wiek, nr telefonu, miejscowość + wymiary: wzrost, klatka, pas, biodra, rozmiar ubrania i buta

W załączniku: ZDJĘCIE TWARZY I SYLWETKI: tylko z dnia zgłoszenia + panowie zdjęcie twarzy z profilu

ZDJĘCIE TWARZY - portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe.

ZDJĘCIE SYLWETKI – aktualne, cała sylwetka

***SERDECZNIE ZAPRASZAMY***

items.text:
This is an unpaid acting opportunity that takes approx. 5 mins.

We will credit you and you can use the experience on your resume as being in an advert. 

There is no travel, as long as you have a good quality set up and can record yourself saying a few words approx. 10-20 secs and send to us. 

Email hi@coconutspaces.com and I will send you a script. You record in your own time and send back. After editing we will send the entire advert to you to add to your portfolio. 

Seeking all ages 18-99 all sexes and genders All races - everyone welcome! 

Much Love, 

www.coconutspaces.com

items.text:
# **CASTING CALL!!** - *BRISTOL* 
# SHORT STUDENT FILM - 'THE LOCK INN'
# LOOKING FOR 3 SUPPORTING MALE ROLES.

FILM SUMMARY: A savvy bartender and her layabout coworkers must prevent the spread of a zombie-like virus outbreak in their small town, which turns their rude, ungrateful regulars into deadly, flesh-hungry crawlers. Can she find a way to survive with her fellow bar staff, or die in a dead-end job?

SHOOTING DATES: 23rd - 27th March.

Owing to this being a low-budget student production, we will offer an honorarium of £50 and cover all travel and food expenses for the shoots.

NOTE: This short may also be submitted to festivals or published on social media. All roles listed will require “zombie-fied” makeup, performed by our makeup artist. This will be minor and non-invasive.

# If interested: Please email [Gwen.Willcox@boomsatsuma.education](mailto:Gwen.Willcox@boomsatsuma.education) 
# To send through a headshot/showreel. 

# DEADLINE: 8PM - 12TH MARCH 2026

On the night of a zombie virus outbreak, it's down to Aaron to prove his resourcefulness to his co-workers, or die trying. Interested? Scan this QR Code to be directed to the application!'

items.text:
📢 OPEN CALL FOR ARTISTS

Are you an artist in circus, music, dance, theater, or other performance arts? Join us for the second edition of the Buka Buskers Fest!

📍August 1 and 2, 2026, Piana degli Albanesi (PA) SICILY!

🎪 We invite performers from around the world to join us for a great celebration to support the local community and bring the historic Rrokat neighborhood back to life. We will create a shared experience of healing and beauty, get to know each other, and experiment with new artistic materials.

📝 APPLICATIONS: Submit your proposal by June 30th using the form:

👉🏻 [www.bukabuskers.com/open-call-2026/](https://www.bukabuskers.com/open-call-2026/)

Info: [bukabuskers@gmail.com](mailto:bukabuskers@gmail.com)

The Buka Buskers Fest is made possible thanks to the support of the Municipality of Piana degli Albanesi, conceived and directed by Federica Cuccia, and organized in collaboration with Giusi Maria Puglia and Matteo Lascari, Pro Loco Piana degli Albanesi, Qmedia, Cooperativa Controvento-SKLIZZA, and Radio In.

items.text:
**Casting Call - Volunteer, Non-union, IMDB credit, Snippet**

I'm casting for a comedy film- Vijay Finds His Dating Mojo. I plan to send this film to film festivals and use it as a proof of concept for a feature film. 

**Synopsis-** An immigrant from India, Vijay, takes services from a manipulative dating coach, Jason. After several failures, Vijay decides to discard pickup lines and pretensions and be himself. He meets Sophia, and they hit it off. Will him being honest work out or backfire?

**Casting:**
Jason (23-35) Caucasian, charismatic, manipulative, eloquent, materialistic, pushy, and cynical. He is a dating guru who teaches Vijay dating lessons. Shoot on 4th April. 

Sophia (23-35) Strong and confident, normal to higher-weight, sassy, eloquent, bold, had a recent breakup, and impulsive. Any ethnicity. She had a recent break and is now going through a rebound. Shoot on 4th and 5th April. 

Rumi (23-35) Self-assured, quick-witted, open-minded, and straightforward. Asian. Started a new job as an accountant and overworked. Shoot on 5th April. 

Jessica (22-35) Beautiful, party girl, kind, good listener, has high morals, and is fashionable. Any ethnicity. Shoot on 5th April.

**Casting Call - Volunteer, Non-union, IMDB credit, Snippet**

I'm casting for a comedy film- Vijay Finds His Dating Mojo. I plan to send this film to film festivals and use it as a proof of concept for a feature film. 

**Synopsis-** An immigrant from India, Vijay, takes services from a manipulative dating coach, Jason. After several failures, Vijay decides to discard pickup lines and pretensions and be himself. He meets Sophia, and they hit it off. Will him being honest work out or backfire?

**Casting:**

items.text:
**WARSZAWA**

** **

**serial fabularny – EPIZODY DZIECIĘCE**

 

Na wiosnę ruszamy z nowym serialem fabularnym, a do którego teraz szukamy **CHŁOPCÓW 8-10 LAT z doświadczeniem** **epizodycznym** na planach zdjęciowych.

Chłopcy muszą płynnie mówić po polsku, bez akcentu.

Chętnie zobaczymy tu bliźniaków.

 

Stawki ustalane indywidualnie. Wybory należą do reżysera.

 

***Do zgłoszenia proszę załączyć aktualną wizytówkę dziecka jako link do You Tube***

*** ***

Zgłoszenia poproszę na adres: **ewelina.wika@podtytulem.pl**

W tytule: **CHŁOPIEC**

W treści: imię i nazwisko dziecka i rodzica, wiek dziecka, nr telefonu, miejscowość, wzrost

W załączniku: **aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki**

** **

**ZDJĘCIE TWARZY** - portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe.

**ZDJĘCIE SYLWETKI** – aktualne, cała sylwetka

Otwieramy nabór do zespołu projektu **Viridian: The Silent City**.

Film wchodzi w etap produkcji, kompletujemy skład ekipy.

Przed wysłaniem zgłoszenia prosimy o obejrzenie wideo pod linkiem, ważne, aby sprawdzić, czy koncepcja i scenariusz są Wam bliskie.

Jeśli czujecie, że chcecie stać się częścią projektu, napiszcie w wiadomości prywatnej.

items.previewDescription: In 2042, in a secret laboratory near Warsaw, an international team of scientists developed the VIRIDIAN serum an experimental bio mRNA agent designed to neutralize aggression in the human brain and thus prevent the outbreak of World War III. However, something went wrong. The virus mutated. Instead....

sharedPost.text:
CASTING CALL – INDEPENDENT SHORT FILM
📍 Grand Rapids, Michigan

KingsVisuals Productions is casting for a faith-based supernatural thriller short film titled “The Price of Power.”

!All races are invited and welcome!

We are currently looking for strong actors for several main roles.
Filming will take place in the Grand Rapids area and is scheduled for Summer 2026.

 IMPORTANT

This is a non-paid project, but actors will receive:
• On-screen film credit
• Professional footage for your reel
• Meals / catering on set
• Transportation support if you live within 30 minutes of Grand Rapids
• Opportunity to work on a high-quality cinematic project
This is a great opportunity for actors who want to build their portfolio, reel, or IMDb credits.

ROLES WE ARE CASTING

GLORIA (Lead Role)
Female | Age 9–12
A strong and intelligent child who carries a mysterious spiritual authority. She must balance innocence with quiet strength.
(Parent/guardian required on set.)

MICHAEL (Lead Role)
Male | Age 25–35
A struggling but compassionate man who unexpectedly becomes Gloria’s protector. Honest, grounded, and emotionally expressive.

NATAS (Main Villain)
Male | Age 30–50
Charismatic yet intimidating supernatural antagonist. Calm, manipulative, and powerful presence.

PASTOR JOHN
Male | Age 35–60
A pastor under financial pressure who becomes tempted by supernatural power. A complex character with a strong emotional arc.

PASTOR SAMUEL
Male | Age 45–75
A wise and spiritually grounded former pastor who understands the ancient covenant behind the rings.

 HOW TO SUBMIT
Please send:
• Your name
• Age
• Headshot or recent photo
• Acting experience (if any)
• Demo reel (optional but preferred)
• Your location
Send submissions to:
📧 Kingsideview@gmail.com

We are building a passionate team for this project and looking for actors who want to be part of something meaningful and cinematic.
Please share this post with actors who may be interested.
🎥 KingsVisuals Productions

items.text:
Hi everyone! 😊

We recently launched a YouTube channel where we share our experience as dancers working on cruise ships and talk about different aspects of this career. 🚢💃

Our first video answers a question we get asked very often: **how much a cruise ship dancer earns** and what this lifestyle is really like for professional dancers.

The video is in **Romanian**, but you can easily turn on **English subtitles** by clicking **CC (Subtitles)** and selecting **English**.

If you're curious about this path or ever considered working on cruise ships as a dancer, we hope you might find it interesting and helpful.

items.text:
Thursday March 12th 11am-5pm
Pro audio company is seeking a MALE model/actor

Age: 34-46

Pay: $100/hour

This shoot will take place at a professional recording studio in Los Angeles area. You will act as a music producer, explaining how to use our software and headphones in an informative video. Script is 2 pages, you will be provided a teleprompter.

Model must speak clearly and concisely and is very comfortable speaking on camera. we want someone who is a "natural" and is able to deliver the information well to a diverse audience.

To apply please message me photo AND video of you introducing yourself. Must be available on the date/time listed above.

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – LEAD ROLE: TYE 🎬
We’re officially looking for the lead role of TYE!
Seeking confident, strong on-screen presence — studs preferred — but if you’re a talented actor who can fully embody the character of TYE, we want you to go for it!
TYE is bold, layered, authentic, and carries a powerful presence. This role requires emotional depth, charisma, and the ability to command the screen.
If you’re serious about your craft and ready to step into a leading role, this is your moment.
📍 Location: Los Angeles
🎥 Filming: Mid-March
📧 Submit headshot, reel (if available), and contact info to: multidimensionaldream@gmail.com
Spread the word — we’re looking for someone ready to bring TYE to life! 🔥

items.text:
Hallo liebe Filmfreunde
Ich bin Gavin 20 Jahre alt und gehe diesen Herbst an die Lazi Filmakademie in Esslingen. Hat jemand schon Erfahrungen mit dieser Schule gemacht, oder geht evt aktuell dorthin und weiß wir das dort mit WG funktioniert. Würde mich mega freuen wenn ihr mich anschreiben würdet und man mal privat reden könnte.

Ich bin Gavin 20 Jahre alt und gehe diesen Herbst an die Lazi Filmakademie in Esslingen. Hat jemand schon Erfahrungen mit dieser Schule gemacht, oder geht evt aktuell dorthin und weiß wir das dort mit WG funktioniert. sharedPost.text:
Hey Leute für unser aktuelles Low Budget Fantasy/Horror Filmprojekt suchen wir noch Darsteller männlich und weiblich für die Endschlacht, Rollen: Ritter und Räuber. Voraussichtlicher Sart der Endschlachtszenen, April 2026, gedreht wird im Bayerischen Wald. Bewerbungen mit 2-3 aktuellen Bildern von euch, sowie eure Körpergröße, Kleidergröße, Schuhgröße, gerne auch ein kurzes Vorstellungsvideo an harlekin-filme@web.de oder direkt per Messenger an Harlekin Filme  

Liebe Grüße, euer Harlekin Filme Team

items.text:
**Mini serial  wojenny 1940 – Szukamy matki francuskiej dziewczynki ( casting on-line )**

 

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów **‘’Grupa1940’’** poszukuje kobiety **w wieku 30 – 35 lat** do roli matki francuskiej dziewczynki. Kobieta wystąpi w 2 scenach ataku Niemców na budynek cywilny. W jednej scenie postać matki dziewczynki ma dialog po francusku ze swoją córką. Mile widziana osoba **z Gliwic lub okolic, Zabrze czy Katowice.** Szukamy kogoś bez farbowanych włosów, bez malowanych paznokci czy braku tatuaży na twarzy. Zdjęcia próbne planujemy **15.03.26 między 10:30 a 15:00 ( Niedziela )**

 

**Od maja 2026 planujemy realizacje zdjęc do tego **projektu. Będziemy realizować mini serial oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Od 01.04.25 założyliśmy swój kanał na portalu youtube z filmami z naszych planów żeby można było zobaczyć jak to u nas wygląda od kuchni. 

 

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g

 

**Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

items.text:
Kraków, szukam ludzi do spektaklu

Poszukuję aktorek i aktorów (niekoniecznie profesjonalnych) do autorskiego spektaklu opartego na zmyślonych życiorysach trzech sióstr. Szukam dziewczyn do ról: Siostry - śpiewaczki i Siostry - pielęgniarki, a także dwóch-trzech facetów do ról epizodycznych. Premiera spektaklu: początek maja. Projekt z założenia niekomercyjny, chociaż nie wiadomo, gdzie nas może poprowadzić. Proszę o kontakt na priv. Pozdrawiam.

items.summary:
Kraków, szukam ludzi do spektaklu

Poszukuję aktorek i aktorów (niekoniecznie profesjonalnych) do autorskiego spektaklu opartego na zmyślonych życiorysach trzech sióstr. Szukam dziewczyn do ról: Siostry - śpiewaczki i Siostry - pielęgniarki, a także dwóch-trzech facetów do ról epizodycznych. Premiera spektaklu: początek maja. Projekt z założenia niekomercyjny, chociaż nie wiadomo, gdzie nas może poprowadzić. Proszę o kontakt na priv. Pozdrawiam.
items.title: Kraków, szukam ludzi do spektaklu

Wrocław, film dyplomowy, płatne!

Hej, do filmu dyplomowego na ASP "KORZENIE" poszukuję aktorki dostępnej między 6 a 12 kwietnia.

EWA - ok 30-35 lat, ciężarna żona jednego z głównych bohaterów. Inteligentna, wysoce empatyczna. Stara się pomóc szwagrowi przez subtelne tworzenie okazji, podczas których bracia będą mogli porozmawiać na osobności.

Preferowane ciemniejsze włosy, ale nie jest to wymóg. Zdjęcie wyłącznie podglądowe.

Film realizowany jest w grupie [Kinofaktura](https://www.facebook.com/groups/184277054929526/user/61553716839681/?__cft__[0]=AZbRJj-3xtv9zAEhlDvLHIeIY5yWbDbNHwy4JVg1ju8rVo5ImHBUF1EXCupOjpcnxHo3gKSzSwAhdWvnNZ-fgJRXfjyELTb8RGR5NI-MzN151UPi3Pw1pePVp0N23z9TfIi1Xt_9McAfTWG_TXZJCWfx&__tn__=-]K-R)

items.text:
Casting Call — Female Models (NYC, All 5 Boroughs)

MMPRODUCTIONSFILMS is casting female models across all five boroughs of New York City — Manhattan, Brooklyn, Queens, The Bronx, and Staten Island — for upcoming cinematic visual clips. These projects blend clean framing, emotional presence, and modern NYC energy.

What I’m Looking For
- Women with strong presence and feminine confidence  
- Comfortable on camera and able to take direction  
- Reliable, professional, and aligned with a creative environment  
- Ages 20–35  

What You Receive
- Cinematic footage for your portfolio  
- A complimentary personal photo shoot you can use anytime you need updated photos  
- A professional, respectful, and well‑organized creative space  
- Exposure through final published visuals  

Details
- Locations: Manhattan, Brooklyn, Queens, The Bronx, Staten Island  
- Dates: Flexible  
- Compensation: TFP collaboration (no monetary pay) + free future photo session  
- Roles: Featured model, supporting model, lifestyle scenes, artistic visuals  

To Submit
Send your name, recent photos, IG/portfolio link, and availability.

Casting call for a USC Thesis film Red Fox Run, will have a festival run
Director: Scott Wilson

Logline: Ray Fox thinks he can hide a mob’s drug deal under the cover of a charity golf tournament at his family’s golf course, Red Fox Run—right up until the cops knock on the front door. An original story with heart, humor, and doing bad for the sake of good. Let's bring back the low budget comedy!

Actor Roles we need to fill are as follows;
Deadline is March 15th

We will be filming at the Griffith Park Clubhouse 

Calltime: 9:30 a.m.

Date: March 18th

50 Enthusiastic Golf Course Patrons
2 Mobsters disguised as priests

Please send actor resume and headshots to
Redfoxrunusc@gmail.com or DM Becky Bruner (this would be the best email for any information you may have) this is voluntary, includes IMBD credit as well as crafty and lunch

items.text:
# **🎬Casting Call! For a STUDENT FILM ‘Playback’🎬 URGENT!**

📍**LOCATION:** Hitchin

📆 **DATES:** Tuesday 17th March – Thursday 19th March

💵 **EXPENSES:** Travel and food expenses will be covered

 

**THERAPIST (Monica/Mark): **An **intelligent and compassionate** therapist who remains **calm** under the pressure of her recent client, Zak, who is certain that he sees things in his sleep. They stay **rational and grounded** around Zak - until unsettling evidence suggests something far more disturbing is happening, which results in a** subtle shift **from** confidence to quiet dread.**

**PLAYING AGE: 20+**

**GENDER: ANY**

 

**MOTHER/FATHER (Helen/Harry): **A **caring and devoted parent** of Zak who only wants the best for him, through finding it tough to stay strong and rational. Constantly trying to **talk it through** with Zak and questioning his apparent instability while conveying a **maternal instinct** yet a quiet, **emotional strain** as they see Zak spiralling out of control.  

**PLAYING AGE: 30+**

**GENDER: ANY**

 

**📖SYNOPSIS:** After coming face to face with a sinister figure in the middle of the night, Zak; a young man suffering with mental health issues (or so he’s been told), decides to film himself whilst he sleeps to prove that the figure is more than just an illusion. These odd behaviours are worrying to his **mother/father,** who want the best for him. After showing the footage to his **therapist** (who claims to see nothing), he decides that it is time to take things into his own hands. Instead of going to sleep, he waits for the figure to strike and deals a killing blow. Having caught it all on camera, he shows the proof to his **therapist,** who soon realises that the figure was Zak’s **mother/father** and that perhaps their next session should be separated by a prison cell...

 

Please email [playbacktalent@gmail.com](mailto:playbacktalent@gmail.com) if you are interested, or want further information, with a headshot and showreel if applicable! 😊

items.text:
Audiences are loving The Cottage at Cabrillo Playhouse in San Clemente! Don't miss your chance to join in on the fun and see this hilarious show!

Get your tickets at [https://www.tix.com/ticket-sales/cabrilloplayhouse/2307](https://www.tix.com/ticket-sales/cabrilloplayhouse/2307?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExS1pHSnFEZjhPc0tMVzRKdXNydGMGYXBwX2lkDzUxNDc3MTU2OTIyODA2MQABHmT785rVMuIOeEMGvMa1MlIER-l1Pe2vWiS79WoGLUuE1Zywq-UAPin3DQo8_aem_pll1DpbAhDojc36HejYFag)

The Cottage is a fast-paced, romantic farce set in the English countryside in 1923, where secrets unravel after a woman boldly reveals her affair to both her lover’s and her own husband. What begins as a confession quickly spirals into chaos, as more infidelities and hidden truths come to light. With witty dialogue and unexpected twists, The Cottage hilariously explores the tangled web of love, betrayal, and propriety.

Photo by Eric Modyman

If you loved KENREX or Cruise, then next week come to The Show People Podcast LIVE at The Two Brewers in Clapham with special guest: Jack Holden.

We’ll be exploring his life and career as an actor, writer and storyteller, and the lessons he’s learned along the way, from the fringe, to the West End and now... Broadway.

It’s an intimate live recording, with only 100 seats available and all profits support LGBTQIA+ theatre projects.

🗓️ Wednesday 11th March 2026 | 7:30pm - 10pm
📍 The Two Brewers, 114 Clapham High Street, London SW4 7UJ

Tickets available via the Queer Theatre website

sharedPost.text:
Casting : "Maybe its love, maybe not"

I am Thomas Goersch from Stuttgart Germany. 
Actor and Filmdirector. 
I am making Independent Movies.
I present my movies on International Film festivals and was lucky to receive some awards. 
But the work is not about awards and money, its about making movies for the people to think about.
My next movie is a modern love story:
An elderly man is meeting another younger, very attractive man in the Internet.  But they are from different Continents. They start a long distance relastionship ship. which is full of passion and desire. 
One day the younger man starts to ask for money, cause he is a Student and no more able to pay his bills. 
The older man is full of distrust.
Is he only there  to pay his lovers bills or is there love between them ?
A story with two endings.
One with true love and one with only cheating. Based on a real story.
I am looking for the young attraktive Lover.
Men  25 to 36 years old,  good looking  who is able to film his parts on his own by smartshone
I am always open and honest. You can earn no money on this. but maybe there is a good film in the end promoting for you.
I guess its not necessary that an educated actor is playing this part. so feel free to get in touch
Thats me 
www.imdb.com/name/nm1591928
Get in touch under Thomas.Goersch@vodafonemail.de 
please ask for details.

items.text:
Casting-Aufruf für Kurzfilmprojekt -- Proof of Concept Phase --Leidenschaftliche Zusammenarbeit -- Kassel

Hallo ihr Lieben! Ich arbeite derzeit an einem Kurzfilmprojekt in Kassel und suche begeisterte Schauspieler sowie einen 1st AC (Kameraassistenten/Focus puller), die mit uns zusammenarbeiten möchten. [Weitere freiwillige Crewmitglieder (sowie Maske, Ton, Helfer, etc.) sind willkommen.] Wir befinden uns aktuell in der Proof-of-Concept-Phase, in der wir eine Szene drehen werden, um anschließend eine Finanzierung für die vollständige Produktion zu sichern.

**Über das Projekt:**
* Titel: ALL IN
* Genre: Psychologischer Thriller
* Dauer: Circa 40
* Dauer Proof-of-Concept: 5 min
* Sprache: Englisch (Setsprache noch offen)
* Synopsis: Die Geschichte dreht sich um ein Pokerspiel, das als Plattform für vier Hauptfiguren dient, die sich mit ihrer Vergangenheit auseinandersetzen. Diese werden durch intensive Rückblenden dargestellt.

**Unser Vorgehen:**
* Wir drehen zunächst eine Testszene als Proof of Concept.
* Dieses Material wird genutzt, um ein Budget für die vollständige Produktion zu sichern.
* Table Read ist für April geplant und wird auf Englisch durchgeführt werden.
* Der Dreh des Proof-of-Concepts wird ebenfalls auf Englisch stattfinden.

**Wichtige Hinweise:**
* Schauspieler für Hauptrollen sollten bereit sein, sich Wissen über psychische Erkrankungen und deren charakteristische Merkmale anzueignen, um die Authentizität der Darstellungen zu erhöhen.
* Erforderliche Fähigkeiten: Darstellungen, die komplexe Emotionen wie Trauma, Konfrontation und Verzweiflung authentisch vermitteln; mit Fokus auf subtilem und realistischem Schauspiel.

**Gesuchte Rollen:** Wir sind bereits ein kleines Team, möchten aber trotzdem alle gesuchten Rollen hier noch einmal auflisten.

**Hauptfiguren:**
* Chris (25-40 Jahre) -- zurückgezogen, emotional aufgeladen, trägt eine schwere Last mit sich. Subtil, nie übertrieben.
* K (32-40 Jahre) -- instabil, verzweifelt, zwischen Kontrolle und Zusammenbruch.
> *John -- BESETZT -- dominant, arrogant, aber mit einer tiefen Verletzlichkeit darunter. Muss beides gleichzeitig spielen können.*
> *Trevor -- BESETZT -- kühl, unlesbar, beobachtend. Wenig Text, maximale Wirkung.*

**Nebenrollen:**
* Charlotte (15-17 Jahre) -- warm, fürsorglich, die emotionale Mitte des Films. Ihre Szene ist klein aber entscheidend. -- EVTL. BESETZT --
* Chris, jung (13-14 Jahre) -- wütend, verletzt, noch nicht in der Lage dies auszudrücken. Muss Stille spielen können.
* Vater (Stimme, kein Bild -- vorerst keine Erscheinung vor der Kamera notwendig) -- autoritär, kalt.
* Mutter (Details folgen)

**Weitere Informationen:**
* Essen wird zur Verfügung gestellt (mit veganer Option).
* Drehorte sind im Raum Kassel.
* Für die Proof-of-Concept-Phase kann leider keine Gage gezahlt werden. Anfahrtskosten können jedoch nach Absprache gegebenenfalls übernommen werden.
* Für die vollständige Produktion sind wir aktiv dabei, ein Budget zu sichern. Je nach gesicherter Finanzierung wird eine Gage für alle Darsteller angestrebt.
* Alle Beteiligten erhalten vollständige Credits sowie eine Kopie des fertigen Films.

Wenn du Interesse an einer kreativen, kollaborativen Zusammenarbeit und Lust darauf hast , deine Leidenschaft in einem atmosphärischen Projekt auszuleben, melde dich gerne bei mir! Teile den Beitrag gerne, wenn du jemanden kennst, der interessiert sein könnte. Ich freue mich darauf, von euch zu hören! mail: [maxmeyer414@gmail.com](mailto:maxmeyer414@gmail.com)

sharedPost.text:
Zum Nachhören 

Als Gründerin von u.a. der Ellly-Films, hat sie eine Menge zu erzählen. Im vorliegenden Film geht es um Frauen in Albanien, die quasi als Mann leben, und wo die Grenzen des zugrundeliegenden Gelübdes sind.

items.text:
🎥 MILIONERZY – 1 wyjątkowy odcinek 💜
9.03 nagrania w godz 15:00-20:00

Chcesz zobaczyć, jak wygląda nagranie kultowego programu „Milionerzy” od kuchni? Teraz masz okazję! Szukamy chętnych do udziału w nagraniach w studiu Polsatu.

📅 Kiedy?

9 marzec  2026

📍 Gdzie?

Studio Polsatu, Warszawa – ul. Łubinowa 4

⏰ Godziny:

około 14:15 zbiórka koniec ok 20:00

💸 Kasa:

90 zł gotówka po planie

📩 Jak się zgłosić?

Wypełnij formularz zgłoszeniowy

👉
https://forms.gle/QnzcCRhpMtBcFqgj6

Lub Wyślij maila ze zgłoszeniem na ludzie@unagimedia.pl

👉 w tytule: MLR9

👉 w treści: imię i nazwisko, wiek, aktualne zdjęcie + numer telefonu

Miejsca szybko znikają, więc nie odkładaj tego na później 👀

Do zobaczenia na planie! 🎬🔥

sharedPost.text:
Do sesji zdjęciowej dla muzeum, poszukujemy:
🔹 Kobieta - 30-45 lat

🔹 Mężczyzna - 30-45 lat

🔹 Młodzież - 12 -16 lat (z dokumentami do PIP)

📍 Termin zdjęć: 16.03 (od godz.14:00)

📍 Miejsce: Warszawa

📍 Charakter zdjęć: dzienne, wnętrze.

💰 Stawka: 300 zł za dzień zdjęciowy

(płatne gotówką po planie) 

📸 Wymagania:

• brak widocznych tatuaży

• schludni, eleganccy, estetyczni, zadbany wygląd.

📩 Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać na:

sky.zgloszenia@gmail.com

W tytule maila: Muzeum" 

📌 W treści maila (OBOWIĄZKOWO):

• aktualne zdjęcia (w tym selfie wykonane w dniu zgłoszenia)

• numer telefonu

• wymiary

• wiek

w przypadku dzieci informacja o dokumentach do PIP

❗ Zgłoszenia bez kompletu wymaganych informacji nie będą rozpatrywane.

items.text:
Film Title: Chinese Whispers
We are casting for an upcoming university short film project filming in Newcastle upon Tyne, specifically in the Jesmond Area. 

Due to University regulations, this will be an unpaid student production. The shooting will take place over 3-5 days in late March. 

Things included: 

Travel expenses 

Food provided on shoot days 

Footage shared with actor’s upon request.

 

Movie log line: Working behind the counter of a sketchy Newcastle off licence, Lola pieces together the fractured history of two alcoholic regulars, only to discover their bitter separation was built on a simple miscommunication that might still be undone. 

Roles we are searching for: 

Lola (Shopkeeper): 

Playing Age: 18 - 30 

Character: Sassy, confident, and emotionally intelligent. Lola knows everything about everyone and is always observing. She is inquisitive and sharp, and her goal in the short film is to reconcile a broken-up couple throughout the film 

 

Maggie: 

Playing Age: 40+

Character: Naïve, vulnerable, and an “oversharer”. Maggie is stubborn and in denial about her alcoholism and past relationship. She often claims she “gets drinks for her nerves” when at the shop. 

 

John: 

Playing Age: 40+

Character: Rambunctious and large in personality. John is open about being an alcoholic, slightly sluggish, and talks about Maggie often at the shop. His drinking leads him to reveal personal information to Lola. 

 

Please register your interest by sending an inquiry email to castingbrookehope@gmail.com. Further information regarding casting/auditions will be provided upon your registration of interest.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says '88 OOROC ROC LOASE GEA MER ceaHOεE CHECK YOUR CIGARATTES FOR TOBUY DONRUY AES MERCHANDISE No lnder া Pa POR C-T We Tobacco 18 Please Have LOOKING FOR: CASTING CALL FOR ACTORS CASTING FOR: SECOND YEAR STUDENT SHORT FILM THREE ACTORS NEWCASTLE NEWCASTLEUPONTYNE UPON TYNE FOUND IN CAPTION! BASED IN: FURTHER DETAILS:'

topComments.text: What do you mean by University Regulations? Do they not know that there is an Equity Student Film contract?
