items.text:
🏀 **PAID NBA COMMERCIAL – BASKETBALL PLAYERS WANTED (ALL AGES)**

Hi everyone! My name is Jude, and I’m reaching out from House of Talent. We’re currently casting for an exciting paid commercial project for the NBA and are looking for amazing basketball players of all ages who may be a great fit.

We would love to connect with players, families, and coaches who might be interested in this opportunity!

Details:

• Ages 2 – 65+

• Non-Union

• Filming in Los Angeles

• Shoot Date: March 13

Compensation:

• $1000 + 20% per day filming

• $3000 + 20% usage

If you or someone you know might be a great fit, please submit or let them know!

**How to Apply**

Interested players or teams can view the full project details and submit directly through our secure casting portal, please make sure to select the right category. 

**Coaches / Referees**[ https://refereesandcoaches.castingcrane.com](https://refereesandcoaches.castingcrane.com/)

**Players**

- Under 7 - [https://bballyoungandolder.castingcrane.com/](https://bballyoungandolder.castingcrane.com/)

- 7- 13 years old -[ https://nest.castingcrane.com/dashboard/casting-calls/bball-kids-7-13](https://nest.castingcrane.com/dashboard/casting-calls/bball-kids-7-13)

- 14 - 15 years old [https://bballteens1415.castingcrane.com/](https://bballteens1415.castingcrane.com/)

- 17 - 20 years old [https://nest.castingcrane.com/dashboard/casting-calls/bball-elite-17-20](https://nest.castingcrane.com/dashboard/casting-calls/bball-elite-17-20)

- 40+ [ https://bballyoungandolder.castingcrane.com/](https://bballyoungandolder.castingcrane.com/)

Fitting: Mar. 12th Filming: Mar. 13th and/or Mar. 28th COMPENSATION $1000+ 20% PER DAY FILMING $3000 +20% USAGE BUYOUT DEADLINE: FRIDAY, MARCH 6TH 6 PM PST'

Those auditioning will be provided with sides to read. We'll try different character types and situations with each person. 
This audition will be held 6:15 - 7:00 this Sunday. Walk-ins are welcome.

items.text:
CASTING CALL – EXTRAS NEEDED FOR SPIDER-MAN FAN FILM NON-PAYED 

We are currently casting a small group of background extras for an emotional street scene in our upcoming Spider-Man fan film, “Becoming Our Spider-Man.”

SCENE DESCRIPTION:  
This scene takes place after Spider-Man fails to save one of his allies and is left injured and emotionally broken while the Hobgoblin threatens to finish him. A group of everyday New Yorkers step forward to defend Spider-Man, standing between him and the villain. Inspired by the powerful “You wanna get to him, you gotta go through me” moment, the people of the city remind Spider-Man that it wasn’t his fault, that he tried his best, and that even heroes can’t save everyone. The crowd encourages him to get back up and stop the Goblin.

WHO WE NEED:
• Around 10 background extras  
• All genders, ages 18+  
• Any ethnicity  
• Comfortable performing crowd reactions and possibly a few short supportive lines

PAY / COMPENSATION:
• Volunteer / unpaid background role    
• Great opportunity for actors who want experience in a dramatic superhero scene

LOCATION:
London area (exact filming location will be provided after casting)

TO APPLY:
Please send the following:
• Name  
• Age  
• A recent photo/headshot  
• Any acting experience 

Email submissions to: ppeterb954@gmail.com

Subject line: “Spider-Man Extras Casting”

Be part of the crowd that reminds Spider-Man why the city still believes in him.

items.text:
**🎬Casting Call! For a STUDENT FILM ‘Playback’🎬 URGENT!**

📍**LOCATION:** Hitchin

📆 **DATES:** Tuesday 17th March – Thursday 19th March

💵 **EXPENSES:** Travel and food expenses will be covered

 

**THERAPIST (Monica/Mark): **An **intelligent and compassionate** therapist who remains **calm** under the pressure of her recent client, Zak, who is certain that he sees things in his sleep. They stay **rational and grounded** around Zak - until unsettling evidence suggests something far more disturbing is happening, which results in a** subtle shift **from** confidence to quiet dread.**

**PLAYING AGE: 20+**

**GENDER: ANY**

 

**MOTHER/FATHER (Helen/Harry): **A **caring and devoted parent** of Zak who only wants the best for him, through finding it tough to stay strong and rational. Constantly trying to **talk it through** with Zak and questioning his apparent instability while conveying a **maternal instinct** yet a quiet, **emotional strain** as they see Zak spiralling out of control. 

**PLAYING AGE: 30+**

**GENDER: ANY**

 

**📖SYNOPSIS:** After coming face to face with a sinister figure in the middle of the night, Zak; a young man suffering with mental health issues (or so he’s been told), decides to film himself whilst he sleeps to prove that the figure is more than just an illusion. These odd behaviours are worrying to his **mother/father,** who want the best for him. After showing the footage to his **therapist** (who claims to see nothing), he decides that it is time to take things into his own hands. Instead of going to sleep, he waits for the figure to strike and deals a killing blow. Having caught it all on camera, he shows the proof to his **therapist,** who soon realises that the figure was Zak’s **mother/father** and that perhaps their next session should be separated by a prison cell...

 

Please email [playbacktalent@gmail.com](mailto:playbacktalent@gmail.com) if you are interested, or want further information, with a headshot and showreel if applicable! 😊

items.text:
**EMERGENCY CASTING CALL! SHORT FILM LEAD ACTOR WANTED!**

Our previous actor dropped out so we are urgently searching for a lead actor for our upcoming short film, 'Stages'.

'Stages' follows Francis, who goes to therapy to deal with his recent divorce, spiralling backwards through the stages of grief before he is forced to confront the reality of his denial.

**Genre:** drama, psychological

**CASTING Brief details:**
* Adult male, **late 20s - 50s**
* Filming based **Portsmouth **
* **£150** wage or for travel expense coverage (can be stretched to £200 if travel expenses require)

**REHEARSAL DATES** (not necessary to attend but would be ideal):
* **Thursday 12th March**
* **Friday 13th March**

**SHOOT DATES** (unmovable, must attend, **12pm - 10pm**):
* **Monday 16th - Wednesday 18th**
* Another date in April TBC

Please email **rishchakraborty@gmail.com **if interested!!!

**Deadline: **Tuesday 10th March

Email rishchakraborty@gmail.com ASAP if you are interested! Deadline: Tuesday 10th March'

items.text:
🏀 **PAID NBA COMMERCIAL – BASKETBALL PLAYERS WANTED (ALL AGES)**

Hi everyone! My name is Jude, and I’m reaching out from House of Talent. We’re currently casting for an exciting paid commercial project for the NBA and are looking for amazing basketball players of all ages who may be a great fit.

We would love to connect with players, families, and coaches who might be interested in this opportunity!

Details:

• Ages 2 – 65+

• Non-Union

• Filming in Los Angeles

• Shoot Date: March 13

Compensation:

• $1000 + 20% per day filming

• $3000 + 20% usage

If you or someone you know might be a great fit, please submit or let them know!

**How to Apply**

Interested players or teams can view the full project details and submit directly through our secure casting portal, please make sure to select the right category. 

**Coaches / Referees**[ https://refereesandcoaches.castingcrane.com](https://refereesandcoaches.castingcrane.com/)

items.text:
Hallo zusammen,

für einen globalen Werbespot mit globalen Nutzungsrechten sind wir aktuell auf der Suche nach einer vierköpfigen Familie.

Es handelt sich um einen Werbespot für einen Drohnen-Controller. Der Dreh ist rein visuell und fängt natürliche Familienmomente im Lifestyle-Kontext ein.

**Gesucht werden:**
* Mama
* Papa
* Junge (8–13 Jahre)
* Mädchen (8–13 Jahre)

**Wichtige Voraussetzungen:**
* Keine sichtbaren Tattoos
* Keine Piercings

**Drehort: Südbayern und Innsbruck**

**Drehtage: **
* **2 Drehtage (Outdoor)**
* **Anreise am Abend vor dem ersten Drehtag**
* **Drehschluss am zweiten Drehtag nach Sonnenuntergang**
* **Drehzeitraum: Zwischen 17.03.-25.03.**

Bei Interesse gerne Fotos, Angebot, Alter und Wohnort an: contact@sindynelia.de

Vielen Dank und liebe Grüße
Sindy Tekieli

topComments.text: Eine wichtige Angaben des Honorares fehlt noch!!

items.text:
🃏 Heath Ledger didn't just play a comic book villain—he delivered a masterclass in character motivation. But how did he make such an unrealistic character feel so grounded?
In our latest clip, we explore the genius behind Ledger’s Joker. When the Batman franchise felt "exhausted," the filmmakers pivoted to a raw, naturalistic style. Instead of relying on tired tropes, Ledger focused entirely on what his character desperately wanted.

🎬 The lesson for actors: Whether you're on stage or screen, if you don't know your character's deepest desires, your audience won't care. Find the desire, find the truth.

Watch our quick breakdown below! 👇

What do YOU think made Ledger's performance so unforgettable? Let us know in the comments where you will also find a link to the full lesson!
items.title: Five Actors One Part. What Acting Tips Can We Learn From The Joker?

Wäre hilfreich, wenn ihr die Anzeige teilen würdet. LG Werner

items.text:
**Title:** Room 988

**Genre:** Drama

**Logline:** A suicidal hospital janitor must face her demons when a woman, who lost her son to suicide, refuses to leave the room the janitor has to clean.

**Roles:**

*Summer*, 20s Female: A hospital janitor who’s always been a problem. She's cycled through psychiatrists and therapists, but nothing’s gotten better. She’s in so much pain, and suicide seems like the only way to make it stop.

*The Woman* 50s, Female: A strong-willed career woman whose life was turned upside down when her adult son died by suicide. Now she‘s a mess and she can’t bring herself to leave the room her son died in.

# **WE HAVE CASTED ALL ROLES!!**

**Director:** Holly Mathews 

**Producer/Writer:** Theo Henderson

**Production Type:** Student Film

**Contact Information:** Please contact by email  theo.b.henderson@gmail.com

**Run Time:** Short (4-5 min)

**Compensation:** $150 flat rate.

**Union Status: **Non-Union

**Audition Information: **We will be holding in person chemistry reads in early March. We do not have concrete dates for these at this time. 

**Shooting Schedule:** we are filming March 16th and 17th from 8am-4pm.

**Filming Location:** Auraria Campus, MSU Denver Nursing Simulation Lab.

**Project Description:** If you are interested, please scan the QR code or click the link in the comments to submit a self tape. We are hoping to get all self tapes in by February 28th!

items.text:
NOW ACCEPTING ALL SIGN UPS!
The Lone Tree Arts Center is seeking LOCAL actors of all ethnicities for the heartfelt, funny, and music-filled true story of friendship at the center of ALWAYS… PATSY CLINE. 

This is an Equity LOA production, but non-Equity actors will be considered.

About the show: 

Before her voice became legendary, Patsy Cline formed an unexpected bond with a devoted Texas fan, Louise Seger, after a chance meeting in a honky-tonk. What began as admiration grew into a lasting friendship built on letters, laughter, and a shared love of country music. Featuring over two dozen of Patsy Cline’s greatest hits, including “Crazy,” “Walkin’ After Midnight,” and “I Fall to Pieces,” this uplifting musical celebrates loyalty, resilience, and the enduring power of one unforgettable voice.

Casting: 2 Principal Roles, 2 Understudy Roles. Role descriptions are available on our website: https://www.lonetreeartscenter.org/always-patsy-cline-auditions

Audition Dates and Times:

Monday, March 16, 2026

10:00 AM – 6:00 PM Principal Auditions (EPA)

Scheduling for Equity Actors opens on February 25th. Scheduling for Non-Equity Actors opens on March 5th. An auxiliary cord and an accompanist will be provided.

Callbacks:

Monday, April 6, 2026

9:00 A.M. - 3:00 P.M.

Personnel at Auditions:

Director – Kelly Van Oosbree

Executive Director – Leigh Chandler

Casting Director – Sylvia Gregory CSA

Music Director – Alec Steinhorn

Minimum Salaries:

$975 principal roles

$900 understudy roles

Important Production Dates:

First Rehearsal: 9/15/26

First Tech Rehearsal: 9/27/26

Invited Dress Rehearsal: 10/7/26

Opening Night: 10/8/26

Closing Night: 10/25/26

Materials and audition forms can be submitted online at https://www.lonetreeartscenter.org/always-patsy-cline-auditions

Questions? Contact Saundra Bergman at Saundra.Bergman@cityoflonetree.com or by phone at 720-509-1022.

I really appreciate the resources you share for actors. I’m interested in pursuing more film and TV opportunities and was wondering if you might have any advice or if you’re currently open to submissions or new talent. Thank you so much for your time!

items.text:
Your weekly international comedy meetup in the heart of Warsaw ❣️🤍
Live comedy. Real presence. Shared space.

We host a weekly English-language comedy night where people come together to laugh, listen, and connect in the same room.

Stand-up, improv, and occasional surprises, always live, always shaped by the people who show up.

It’s not about being the biggest or loudest show in town.
It’s about creating a space where comedy feels human again.
Each night is a little different.
Some shows lean more toward stand-up, others toward improv or playful experimentation. Sometimes something unexpected sneaks in. Nothing is repeated exactly the same way twice.

You’ll see a mix of bold local and international comedians, first-timers taking their first five minutes on stage, and more experienced performers trying new material in front of a real audience.

We’re not chasing trends.
We’re simply building something consistent, welcoming, and alive.
Hosted by Miguel Ferreira
A Brazilian comedian based in Warsaw, curious about people, culture, and what happens when strangers laugh together.

Why this exists
Because people miss being in rooms.
Because shared laughter still works.
Because live moments feel different when you’re actually there.
This isn’t background entertainment.
It’s something you’re part of.
Schedule
Happy Hour & Meet & Greet: 7:00 PM
Show starts: 8:00 PM
Location
Południk Zero
Wilcza 25, Warsaw
15 minutes from Pałac Kultury

🎟 Tickets:
https://fienta.com/2-0-comedy-show2-154404

🐾 Well-behaved pets are welcome.
🎤 Thinking about performing?

Each show keeps one spot open for a first-time performer.
Five minutes. One mic. A real audience.
📍 Impact Warsaw
Instagram: @impactwarsaw, @miguelatcomedy
Events: impactwarsaw.com/events
Inner Circle: https://t.me/+xJpuxiG5Au8xMmZk
If you’re curious, you’re welcome.
If you need a break from scrolling, come sit with us.
Just show up and see what happens.

items.text:
**Szukam modelki o długich czarnych włosach ( TFP – Gliwice/Katowice ) lat 30 - 50**

 

Szukam pań które nie krępują się własnego ciała i chciałaby mieć ciekawą pamiątkę w postaci klimatycznych zdjęć. Wiem jak bardzo jest ważna akceptacja własnego ciała bo przez to też możemy inaczej funkcjonować. Przez takie zdjęcia można również tego dokonać. Sesja w głównej mierze jest jako taki motywator. Tematem sesji będzie sensualny Anioł.

 

Poszukuje kobiety w **wieku od + 30  **lat nie koniecznie z doświadczeniem pozowania, na zasadach Tfp mieszkającej w Gliwicach lub okolicach Zabrze czy Katowice najdalej. Posiadam na wyposażeniu mini studio z kilkoma tłami oraz lampami. Mam również duży wybór kostiumów i gadżetów do wykorzystywania. Główny motyw do kobieta: Piękna i drapieżna! Sama sesja trwa przeważnie od 1,5h do 2h w zalezności od motywów.

** **

**Zapraszam na stronę**

** **

**Facebook Łukasz Magiera – Fotografia**

www.instagram.com/lukasz.magiera.official

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

items.text:
# **🎬Casting Call! For a STUDENT FILM ‘Playback’🎬 URGENT!**

📍**LOCATION:** Hitchin

📆 **DATES:** Tuesday 17th March – Thursday 19th March

💵 **EXPENSES:** Travel and food expenses will be covered

 

**THERAPIST (Monica/Mark): **An **intelligent and compassionate** therapist who remains **calm** under the pressure of her recent client, Zak, who is certain that he sees things in his sleep. They stay **rational and grounded** around Zak - until unsettling evidence suggests something far more disturbing is happening, which results in a** subtle shift **from** confidence to quiet dread.**

**PLAYING AGE: 20+**

**GENDER: ANY**

 

**MOTHER/FATHER (Helen/Harry): **A **caring and devoted parent** of Zak who only wants the best for him, through finding it tough to stay strong and rational. Constantly trying to **talk it through** with Zak and questioning his apparent instability while conveying a **maternal instinct** yet a quiet, **emotional strain** as they see Zak spiralling out of control.  

**PLAYING AGE: 30+**

**GENDER: ANY**

 

**📖SYNOPSIS:** After coming face to face with a sinister figure in the middle of the night, Zak; a young man suffering with mental health issues (or so he’s been told), decides to film himself whilst he sleeps to prove that the figure is more than just an illusion. These odd behaviours are worrying to his **mother/father,** who want the best for him. After showing the footage to his **therapist** (who claims to see nothing), he decides that it is time to take things into his own hands. Instead of going to sleep, he waits for the figure to strike and deals a killing blow. Having caught it all on camera, he shows the proof to his **therapist,** who soon realises that the figure was Zak’s **mother/father** and that perhaps their next session should be separated by a prison cell...

 

Please email [playbacktalent@gmail.com](mailto:playbacktalent@gmail.com) if you are interested, or want further information, with a headshot and showreel if applicable! 😊

items.text:
CASTING CALL – EXTRAS NEEDED FOR SPIDER-MAN FAN FILM NON-PAYED 

We are currently casting a small group of background extras for an emotional street scene in our upcoming Spider-Man fan film, “Becoming Our Spider-Man.”

SCENE DESCRIPTION:  
This scene takes place after Spider-Man fails to save one of his allies and is left injured and emotionally broken while the Hobgoblin threatens to finish him. A group of everyday New Yorkers step forward to defend Spider-Man, standing between him and the villain. Inspired by the powerful “You wanna get to him, you gotta go through me” moment, the people of the city remind Spider-Man that it wasn’t his fault, that he tried his best, and that even heroes can’t save everyone. The crowd encourages him to get back up and stop the Goblin.

WHO WE NEED:
• Around 10 background extras  
• All genders, ages 18+  
• Any ethnicity  
• Comfortable performing crowd reactions and possibly a few short supportive lines

PAY / COMPENSATION:
• Volunteer / unpaid background role  
• Food and drinks will be provided on set  
• Great opportunity for actors who want experience in a dramatic superhero scene

LOCATION:
London area (exact filming location will be provided after casting)

TO APPLY:
Please send the following:
• Name  
• Age  
• A recent photo/headshot  
• Any acting experience 

Email submissions to: ppeterb954@gmail.com

Subject line: “Spider-Man Extras Casting”

Be part of the crowd that reminds Spider-Man why the city still believes in him.

items.text:
Looking for black child actress for short Film
I’m working on a 70s inspired psychological thriller short film about a birthday party gone wrong. The film follows a family of 6 living in a dysfunctional household.

I’m looking for a black child actress to play Zunah, the eldest daughter. Playing age: 10

Shooting dates: TBC (4 days)

If you’re a parent or guardian, email info@alessiamavakala.com with a headshot of your child and general availability to express interest.

My website is alessiamavakala.com if you want to check my previous work

topComments.text: No mention of pay or basic expenses?

user.name: Keep it Real Acting - The Premier Acting School

items.text:
Hot take: commercials are not the enemy. They are creative, fast, and one of the best places to learn how to act on camera and get paid while doing it 😉 

If commercials feel intimidating, our A–Z Commercial Acting Class helps you understand what casting is looking for and how to bring your personality into the room!

Learn more about the A–Z Commercial Acting Class here: https://www.keepitrealacting.com/classes/#a-z-commercial-acting

#ActorTraining #CommercialAuditions #ActingClass

items.text:
Jeremy Holzl am Set: Respekt für Deine Beständigkeit 

Jeremy, diese drei Bilder stehen für genau das, was am Set zählt: stille Verlässlichkeit, echte Kollegialität und ein Mensch, auf den man sich einfach freuen kann und all dies mit drei Deiner starken unverwechselbaren Gesichtsausdrücke! 

Als Komparse, u. a. in der RTL Serie "Alles was zählt" und "Unter uns" bist Du nicht nur jemand, der da ist, wenn es drauf ankommt, sondern jemand, der mit Haltung, Respekt und einer angenehm ruhigen Art das Setklima spürbar besser macht. Genau diese Beständigkeit, dieses unaufgeregte Dranbleiben, macht am Ende den Unterschied, weil damit Schritt für Schritt Dinge möglich werden, die vorher nur wie ein Wunsch wirkten. 

Und dann kommt noch etwas dazu, das viele unterschätzen: Du bist auch Fahrer für ein Unternehmen, das Schauspieler zuverlässig ans Set und in Hotels bringt. Das heißt, Du hältst Abläufe am Laufen, bevor die Kamera überhaupt angeht, und genau dafür gebührt Dir genauso Anerkennung wie für alles, was man im Bild sieht. 

Wir zwei, Christian und Sandra, sind jedes Mal wirklich froh, wenn wir am Set mit Dir sind, weil Du genau diese Mischung mitbringst: professionell, menschlich, kollegial. Danke, dass Du so bist, wie Du bist, und dass Du Deine Energie so konstant in dieses Umfeld gibst. 

Wenn Du Jeremy schon am Set erlebt hast, was schätzt Du an seiner Art am meisten, und wen sollte ich als nächstes mit so einer Collage ehren?

Idee, Bilder und Text Christian Weiße und Sandra Wötzel 

#JeremyHolzl #AllesWasZaehlt #UnterUns #RTL #SetLife

STATISTER SØGES TIL KORTFILM (ULØNNET)
Vi er et filmhold fra filmhøjskolen Potemkin i Aarhus og er i gang med at lave en kortfilm, som skal optages ved Hjerl Hede. Hertil har vi brug for statister til at medvirke i en retssagsscene anno 1721.

Lyder det som noget for dig? Så tøv ikke med at kontakte vores producer på:

marie.korsgaard.rasmussen@gmail.com

items.text:
Til tv-serien De Bedste Familier (DR) søges i Jylland:

Ledig, mandlig statistrolle, alder ca. 30 - 45 år, som funktionær. 
Du skal kunne være med til begge optagelsesdage
16/3 ca. 15 - 02.30 og igen 17/3 ca. kl. 11 - 22.30 i Handest Jylland.

Der er kostume/sminkeprøve i Agger på tirsdag d. 10. marts et aftalt tidspunkt ml. 14-19.

Der er i alt 1800 kr. honorar for 
2 optagelsesdage og 1 sminke/kostumeprøve. 
Der er forplejning tilpasset tidsrum på optagelsesdage.
Udgifter til f.eks. transport refunderes ikke.
Evt. overnatninger refunderes ikke.

Følgende krav til krop og udseende pga. tilgængelige kostumer og tidsperioden:

NB! Danmark var ikke så beriget med forskellige nationaliteter, så du skal ligne en med dansk/nordeuropæisk herkomst.

MÆND:
max højde 186, tøjstr. S-L (der er ingen kostume i XL eller over), ingen synlige tatoveringer med skjorte på inkl. håndled eller piercinger, hårfarve skal være naturlig og ensfarvet med mindre gråt, korthåret men nok længde til at kunne sætte sideskilning, ingen kronraget eller karseklippet, ingen skæg på optagelsesdage.

Vi skal kende følgende for at komme i betragtning, som skal sendes i en mail til ajlystbaek@hotmail.com

Navn, alder, mobilnummer, højde, tøjstr., skostr., mål: hoved-hals-bryst-talje-hofte og inseam/outseam.
Der skal være to helt nye billeder: vellignende billede i helfigur samt et selfie, hvor hår og ansigt ses tydeligt.

sharedPost.text:
Hej alle😊

Jeg er 22 år og kommer fra Viborg. 
Min største drøm er at blive skuespiller, og jeg vil virkelig gerne udvikle mig mere. Jeg har været statist i spillefilm, kortfilm og reklamer/kampagner og er klar på at lære endnu mere  foran kameraet.

Jeg er samarbejdsvillig, imødekommende, meget lære nem og mødestabil. ￼￼￼

Kender I til auditions, projekter eller workshops, så må I meget gerne sige til 🙌

Hvis i er interesseret, må i meget gerne skrive til mig på Messenger.￼

Tak på forhånd 
Mvh Maja

attachments.ocrText: No photo description available.
May be an image of one or more people and blonde hair

topComments.text: Hej Maja. Jeg er også fra Viborg. Prøv at kontakte Medieskolen i Viborg. Deres elever producerer mange kortfilm hvert år, og de bruger skuespillere udefra. Det er selvfølgelig ulønnet, men det er noget af den bedste erfaring, du kan få som skuespiller. Jeg ligger selv i deres "kartotek" og laver af og til film med deres elever.

Last Saturday morning, March 7, 2026, marked the first ever Singing Class at LTA 🎤✨ 

A great and successful start as we began assessing and enhancing the voices of our students — perfect for those who are starting to explore and improve their singing voice. 

We also proudly welcome Coach Sheynan, our newest coach at LTA, who shares her learnings and experience in singing techniques to help guide and inspire the next generation of singers; an independent singer-songwriter who explores and expresses her passion through music. 

More students are expected to enroll this summer, and we’re excited to see more voices grow! 🌟 

📸 Captured by Ryendrick Leobrera

items.text:
**[CREW CALL: TRADE & BARTER] – LA/Burbank – Narrative Vertical Series **

I’m producing a 3-episode narrative series titled **"Kandor Kin."** This is a "Live Classroom" project focused on the contrast between industry exploitation and the safety of a self-sustaining creative ecosystem.

**The Project:**
* **Format:** 3 Vertical Episodes (approx. 1 min each)
* **Shoot Time:** 6–7 hour window (One Day)
* **Location:** Basecamp (Burbank)
* **Date:** Late March

**Looking For:**
* **DP / Videographers:** High-impact, narrative-style shooters.
* **Gaffer:** Lighting is the "lead character" here—we need to visually separate the "Cold Industry" from the "Warm Kin" environment.

**The Reality:** This is an unpaid production for our nonprofit arm, but **Kollective Kandor** doesn't believe in "free." We believe in mutual sustainability and circulating resources.

**In exchange for your talent/gear, I am offering:**
1. **LOCATION SPONSORSHIP:** Access/Sponsorship for a restaurant or food truck location for your next project.
2. **ORIGINAL SCORE:** I will provide custom music composition/scoring for your next visual project (under 10 mins).
3. **CASTING:** Access to our curated roster of actors for your future productions.

If you’re tired of the "starving artist" gatekeeping and want to build a healthier ecosystem while getting high-end narrative content for your reel, let’s talk.

**DROP your role + your choice of exchange below, or DM me with your reel/work.**

items.text:
BOXING FITNESS
My name is Rameses. I’m a professional boxer currently in fight camp training in Hollywood at the legendary Wild Card Boxing Club under Hall-of-Fame trainer.
During camp I have a limited number of afternoon training sessions available (12:00pm–3:30pm, Monday–Friday) for anyone interested in learning real boxing technique or incorporating boxing conditioning into their fitness routine.
Boxing is one of the most efficient workouts available and is used by many actors and professionals to build conditioning, coordination, and mental focus.

Who this is for: 
• Beginners 
• Adults & Busy professionals who want an efficient, focused workout
• Women interested in boxing for confidence & self-defense
• Kids and teens 
• Athletes wanting to sharpen skills, speed & coordination

Sessions focus on: 
🥊 Boxing fundamentals
🥊 Mitt work and footwork
🥊 Conditioning and core strength
🥊 Skill development and movement

All levels welcome, including complete beginners.
If you’re interested in training or want more information, feel free to send me a message.

Thanks everyone.

items.text:
UPDATED: NOW OFFERING RELOCATION FOR THE RIGHT CANDIDATE

 

If you know of an Executive/ Personal Assistant that has worked for UHNW or A-list celebs long term and is looking for work in NYC, please send them my way! This is 100% a lifestyle position and the people who will be considered will have had solid experience over the past 5-10 years (minimum) with ONE to TWO heavily traveled, fast paced principals full time. If you have had more than three positions over the past 10 years you will not be considered, proven longevity in a fast paced environment is what this client is looking for. 

Feel free to share with qualified candidates and please do not DM me on FB. Send resumes to Bridget@slggroupstaffing.com or call me at (347)405-1665

Thank you! 

EXECUTIVE ASSISTANT / PERSONAL ASSISTANT (ON-CALL HANDLER)-NEW YORK, NY (Relocation offered for the right candidate)

This role supports a high-profile founder/chief creative consultant/senior executive leadership individual within a global premium fashion brand. The Executive Assistant/Personal Assistant serves as a trusted, on-call handler across professional priorities managing all and more including personal logistics. The principal is highly particular, fast-moving, exceptionally smart and requires a calm, polished partner who can operate with total discretion and urgency.

This is a demanding role with true on-call availability that requires a 24/7 mindset and flexibility. The outgoing assistant has provided extended notice to allow for thoughtful hands-on training

Requirements

24/7 on-call availability (non-negotiable)

High discretion, privacy-first mindset; comfort signing multiple NDAs plus confidentiality documents

Prior support experience within celebrity, high-profile, or ultra-visible environments

Excellent written communication plus strong verbal presence (polished, concise, precise)

Tech savvy; comfort managing international scheduling plus time zones

Experience coordinating private jet travel (fractional programs plus commercial travel)

Ability to travel as needed, including occasional support from personal residences

Qualifications

Type A, detail-obsessed, proactive, plus highly organized

Strong judgment, strong boundaries, plus exceptional confidentiality

“Listen-first” communication style (thoughtful, measured, well-informed)

Calm under pressure; able to adjust quickly to last-minute change

Comfortable coordinating across drivers, household staff, vendors, building staff, plus internal teams

Prior long-tenure support roles strongly preferred

Responsibilities

Calendar + scheduling management

Manage the principal’s calendar, screening requests for meetings, appearances, events, calls, plus personal appointments

Build schedules that protect focus time, travel time, plus realistic transitions

Keep meetings within allotted time to maintain schedule integrity

On-call handler support

Respond promptly to time-sensitive changes outside standard business hours

Act as a trusted point of contact for urgent needs, updates, plus pivots

Daily coordination + logistics

Coordinate with drivers, household staff, office personnel to ensure seamless arrivals, departures, plus daily flow

Prepare for in-person meetings: room readiness, supplies, refreshments, light reset post-meeting

Order plus plate meals in office as needed

Manage inventory of personal items used for styling shoots plus prototyping

Prepare decks for meetings plus general information sharing

Home events + personal support

Plan plus manage events at the principal’s home: vendors (catering, waitstaff, décor, entertainment, rentals), building coordination, invites, guest lists

Coordinate glam for personal plus business events, including travel for hair plus makeup professionals (air, rail, Eurostar)

Provide typing support for edits: speeches, scripts, written interview responses, reference letters

Location: New York City, NY

Schedule: Full-time, highly flexible schedule with significant after-hours responsiveness. Ongoing on-call expectations. 24/7 mindset required

Salary + Benefits: $200,000–$250,000 base salary, plus bonus potential. Strong long-term opportunity with a principal known for taking care of her people

Employment is contingent upon a clear background check and verification of professional employer references
